using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;

namespace TicketSalesSystem.ViewModel.Programme.Index
{
    public class VMprogrammeIndex
    {
        [Key]
        public string ProgrammeID { get; set; } = null!;
        public string ProgrammeName { get; set; } = null!;
        public string? CoverImage { get; set; }
        public string PlaceName { get; set; } = "©|•ľ§ĹßG¶a¬I";

        // ™¨ļA¨Ř√Ų
        public string ProgrammeStatusID { get; set; } = null!;
        public string ProgrammeStatusName { get; set; } = "į‚≤ľ§§";

        // ≤ľľ∆≠pļ‚
        public int Capacity { get; set; }
        public int Remaining { get; set; }
        public int SoldCount => Capacity - Remaining;
        public int SalesPercent => Capacity > 0 ? (int)((double)SoldCount / Capacity * 100) : 0;

        // ?? ≠ę¬I°GĹTęO List ¶bęōļcģ…īN™ž©l§∆°A®ĺ§Ó NullReference
        public List<ProgrammeIndexSession> Session { get; set; } = new List<ProgrammeIndexSession>();

        // √C¶‚ßP¬_ (ęOęýßA≠ž•Ľ™ļŇřŅŤ)
        public string StatusColor => ProgrammeStatusID switch
        {
            "D" => "warning",   // Draft (ĮůĹZ) - ∂ņ¶‚°Aī£ŅŰ©|•ľĶo•¨
            "R" => "info",      // Ready (≥]©wßĻ¶®/ßYĪN∂}Ĺś) - ≤L¬Ň¶‚
            "O" => "success",   // OnSale (į‚≤ľ§§) - ļŮ¶‚
            "S" => "dark",      // Sold Out (§wį‚ßĻ) - ∂¬¶‚©ő≤`¶«¶‚°A•N™ŪßĻį‚
            "H" => "light",     // Hidden (§w§U¨[) - ≤L¶‚°AßCĹ’Ň„•‹
            "E" => "secondary", // Ended (§wĶ≤ßŰ) - ¶«¶‚
            "C" => "danger",    // Canceled (§w®ķģÝ) - ¨ű¶‚
            _ => "primary"      // Ļw≥] - ¬Ň¶‚
        };
    }
}

using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;
using TicketSalesSystem.ViewModel.Programme.CreateProgramme.Item;
using TicketSalesSystem.ViewModel.Programme.Index;

namespace TicketSalesSystem.ViewModel.Programme
{
    public class VMProgramme
    {

        public string? EmployeeID { get; set; }

        [Key]
        public string ProgrammeID { get; set; } = null!;
        public string ProgrammeName { get; set; } = null!;
        public string? CoverImage { get; set; }
        public string PlaceID { get; set; } = null!;
        public string PlaceName { get; set; } = null!;


        public string SessionID { get; set; } = null!;
        public DateTime SaleStartTime { get; set; }
        public DateTime SaleEndTime { get; set; }
        public DateTime? StartTime { get; set; }




        public string ProgrammeStatusID { get; set; } = null!;
        public string ProgrammeStatusName { get; set; } = null!;


        public string FinalStatusText => ProgrammeStatusName;

        public int Capacity { get; set; }  // Ń`ģw¶s
        public int Remaining { get; set; } // Ń`≥—ĺl

        //§wį‚•Xľ∆∂q
        public int SoldCount => Capacity - Remaining;

        // ≠pļ‚ĺPį‚¶ §ņ§Ů™ļįŖŇ™ń›© 
        public int SalesPercent => Capacity > 0
            ? (int)((double)SoldCount / Capacity * 100)
            : 0;

        //√C¶‚ßP¬_
        public string StatusColor => ProgrammeStatusID switch
        {
            "D" => "warning",   // Draft (ĮůĹZ) - ∂ņ¶‚°Aī£ŅŰ©|•ľĶo•¨
            "R" => "info",      // Ready (≥]©wßĻ¶®/ßYĪN∂}Ĺś) - ≤L¬Ň¶‚
            "O" => "success",   // OnSale (į‚≤ľ§§) - ļŮ¶‚
            "S" => "dark",      // Sold Out (§wį‚ßĻ) - ∂¬¶‚©ő≤`¶«¶‚°A•N™ŪßĻį‚
            "H" => "light",     // Hidden (§w§U¨[) - ≤L¶‚°AßCĹ’Ň„•‹
            "E" => "secondary", // Ended (§wĶ≤ßŰ) - ¶«¶‚
            "C" => "danger",    // Canceled (§w®ķģÝ) - ¨ű¶‚
            _ => "primary"      // Ļw≥] - ¬Ň¶‚
        };

        public List<ProgrammeIndexSession> Session { get; set; } = new List<ProgrammeIndexSession>();


    }
}

        [Key]
        [Display(Name = "∑|≠ŻĹsłĻ")]

        public string? MemberID { get; set; } 

        [Display(Name = "∑|≠Ż©m¶W")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "•≤∂Ů")]
        [StringLength(20, MinimumLength = 2, ErrorMessage = "Ĺ–Ņť§J2~20≠”¶r")]
        public string Name { get; set; } 

        [Display(Name = "∑|≠Ż¶aß}")]

        [MemberTelDuplicateCheck]
        public string Tel { get; set; } 

        [Display(Name = "© ßO")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "•≤∂Ů")]
        public bool Gender { get; set; }

        [Display(Name = "®≠§ņ√“¶rłĻ")]

        [AccountDuplicateCheck]

using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;

namespace TicketSalesSystem.ViewModel.Login
{
    public class VMResetPassword
    {
        // ?? ģ÷§Ŗ°Gņx¶s®ļ¶Í™Ý™Ý™ļ•[ĪK¶r¶Í (ĪqļŰß}¶Cßž®ķ)
        [Required]
        public string Token { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        [Required(ErrorMessage = "Ĺ–Ņť§J∑s≥q¶śĹX")]
        [DataType(DataType.Password)]
        [MinLength(6, ErrorMessage = "ĪKĹX™Ýę◊¶‹§÷Ľ›≠n 6 ¶ž")]
        [Display(Name = "∑sĪKĹX")]
        public string NewPassword { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        [Required(ErrorMessage = "Ĺ–¶A¶łĹTĽ{∑s≥q¶śĹX")]
        [DataType(DataType.Password)]
        [Compare("NewPassword", ErrorMessage = "®‚¶łŅť§J™ļĪKĹX§£§@≠P")]
        [Display(Name = "ĹTĽ{∑sĪKĹX")]
        public string ConfirmPassword { get; set; } = string.Empty;


    }
}

    }

@* --- ?? ≥Ľ≥°ĹŁľĹ°GĮ¬≤bĶLģō™© --- *@
<div id="carouselBanner" class="carousel slide mb-0" data-bs-ride="carousel">
    <div class="carousel-indicators">
        @for (int i = 0; i < Model.Count(); i++)
        {
            var activeClass = i == 0 ? "active" : "";
            <button type="button" data-bs-target="#carouselBanner" data-bs-slide-to="@i" class="@activeClass"></button>
        }
    </div>
    <div class="carousel-inner">
        @foreach (var item in Model)
        {
            var a = item == Model.First() ? "active" : "";
            <div class="carousel-item @a">
                <a asp-controller="Programmes" asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@item.ProgrammeID">
                    <img src="~/Photos/CoverImage/@item.CoverImage" class="d-block w-100" alt="@item.ProgrammeName">
                    
                </a>
            </div>
        }
    </div>
    <button class="carousel-control-prev" type="button" data-bs-target="#carouselBanner" data-bs-slide="prev">
        <span class="carousel-control-prev-icon" aria-hidden="true"></span>
        <span class="visually-hidden">Previous</span>
    </button>
    <button class="carousel-control-next" type="button" data-bs-target="#carouselBanner" data-bs-slide="next">
        <span class="carousel-control-next-icon" aria-hidden="true"></span>
        <span class="visually-hidden">Next</span>
    </button>
</div>



@* --- ?? §ļģeįŌ∂Ű°GņO≠i•~ģōģM•ő¶b¶Ļ --- *@
<div class="container pb-5 mt-5">
    
    @* ≥Ő∑sģÝģßįŌ∂Ű *@

        // ĺ‘≥NńĶ•‹ŇřŅŤ
        const statusSelect = document.querySelector('#OrderStatusID');
        const initialVal = statusSelect.value;
        statusSelect.addEventListener('change', function() {
            if (['C', 'N'].includes(this.value)) {
                if (!confirm("?? [™`∑N!!]\n\n¶Ļĺřß@ĪN∑|ĶýĺP©“¶≥√ŲŃp≤ľ®ť®√ńņ©Ůģy¶žģw¶s°C\nł”Ķ{ß«¨į§£•iįf¬ŗ§ß®MĶ¶°CĹT©w≠nįű¶ś∂‹°H")) {
                    this.value = initialVal;
                }
            }
        });
    </script>
}

@section Scripts {

        <script>
            function viewProtocol(title, content) {
                // Īņ¬ň®Ō•ő SweetAlert2 ©ő¨O¶Ř©włq Modal
                Swal.fire({
                    title: `<span style="color: #00f2ff; font-family: 'Share Tech Mono'; font-weight: 800;">${title}</span>`,
                    html: `<div style="text-align: left; color: #fff; opacity: 0.8; white-space: pre-line; font-size: 0.95rem; line-height: 1.8;">${content}</div>`,
                    background: 'rgba(0, 11, 26, 0.95)',
                    backdrop: 'rgba(0, 242, 255, 0.1)',
                    confirmButtonText: 'ACKNOWLEDGE',
                    confirmButtonColor: '#00f2ff',
                    customClass: {
                        popup: 'cyber-card' // ŇżľuĶ°§]®„≥∆Ń…≥’Ī◊§Ń®§
                    }
                });
            }
        </script>

}

@section Scripts {

    <script>
        let currentSession = "";
        let currentArea = "";
        let currentVenue = "";
        let currentPrice=0;

        //≠ňľ∆≠pģ…
        function startTimer(duration, display) {
            let timer = parseInt(duration);
            if (isNaN(timer))
            {
            timer = 600;
            }
            // ¶p™G§ßęe§włg¶≥≠pģ…ĺĻ¶b∂]°A•ż≤MĪľ•¶•HßKŇ|•[
            if (window.bookingInterval) clearInterval(window.bookingInterval);

            function updateDisplay()
            {
            let minutes = Math.floor(timer / 60);
            let seconds = timer%10;
             minutes = minutes < 10 ? "0" + minutes : minutes;
             seconds = seconds < 10 ? "0" + seconds : seconds;
             display.textContent = `${minutes}:${seconds}`;
            }

            updateDisplay();

            window.bookingInterval = setInterval(function () {
            if (timer-- < 0)
            {
                 clearInterval(window.bookingInterval);
                 display.textContent = "00:00";
                 alert("? ģ…∂°®ž°IĪz™ļ≠q¶ž§w≥Q®ķģÝ°AĹ–≠ę∑sŅÔĺ‹ģy¶ž°C");
                 location.reload();
                 return;
            }
            updateDisplay();
            }, 1000);
        }

        // 1. ¬IŅÔ≥ű¶ł
        document.querySelectorAll('.session-item').forEach(btn => {
            btn.onclick = async function() {
                currentSession = this.dataset.id;

                // §Ńīęľň¶°
                document.querySelectorAll('.session-item').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
                this.classList.add('active');
                try {
                // ßž®ķ≤ľįŌ
                const res = await fetch(`/Seats/GetAreasBySession?sessionId=${currentSession}`);
                const areas = await res.json();

                console.log(areas);

                let areaHtml = areas.map(a => `
                    <div class="col-md-4 mb-3">
                        <div class="card area-card p-3 border-primary" style="cursor:pointer"
                             onclick="selectArea(
                                '${a.ticketsAreaID}',
                                '${a.ticketsAreaName}',
                                ${a.price},
                                '${a.venueID}'
                             )">
                            <h5>${a.ticketsAreaName}</h5>
                            <p class="text-danger">$${a.price}</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `).join('');


                document.getElementById('areaList').innerHTML = areaHtml;
                document.getElementById('areaSection').style.display = 'block';
                document.getElementById('bookingSection').style.display = 'none';
                } catch (err) {
                console.error("ßž®ķ≤ľįŌ•ĘĪ—:", err);
            }
            };
        });

        // 2. ŅÔĺ‹≤ľįŌ
        function selectArea(id, name, price, venueId) {
            currentArea = id;
            currentVenue = venueId;
            currentPrice = price;


            document.getElementById('selectedInfo').innerText = `§wŅÔ≥ű¶ł°G${currentSession} | ≤ľįŌ°G${name} ($${price})`;
            document.getElementById('bookingSection').style.display = 'block';
        }

               // 3. §@Ńšįt¶ž®√Ń ≤ľ (™ĹĪĶ©I•sĺ„¶X§Fįt¶žŇřŅŤ™ļ ConfirmBooking)
               document.getElementById('autoAndConfirmBtn').onclick = async function() {
            try {
                // 1. ßž®ķĶe≠Ī§WŅÔ≥ś™ļĪiľ∆ (≥o¶ś§@©w≠n•[°I)
                const ticketCountElement = document.getElementById('ticketCount');
                const countValue = parseInt(ticketCountElement.value);

                // 2. ęō•ŖĹ–®D™ę•ů
                const bookingData = {
                    VenueID:currentVenue,
                    SessionID: currentSession,
                    TicketsAreaID: currentArea,
                    MemberID: "008783c7-31da-4d39-bba4-70ceed5939e4",
                    PaymentMethodID: "A",
                    Count:countValue, // ĹTęO¶WļŔĽPęŠļ› ViewModel §@≠P
                    TotalAmount:currentPrice*countValue,
                    Seat:[]
                };

                // 3. ĶoįeĹ–®D
                const res = await fetch('/Seats/ConfirmBooking', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify(bookingData)
                });

                // ¶p™G¶Ý™AĺĻ¶^∂« 404 ©ő 500
                if (!res.ok) {
                    alert(`¶Ý™AĺĻŅýĽ~: ${res.status}`);
                    return;
                }

                const result = await res.json();

            if (result.success) {
                console.log("ęŠļ›¶^∂«łÍģ∆:", result);

                // 1. ĪNģy¶žģś¶°ņu§∆ (®“¶p 1-1 Ň‹¶® 1Ī∆1łĻ)
                const seatDisplay = result.seats.map(s => s.replace('-', 'Ī∆') + 'łĻ').join(', ');

                // 2. ®ķĪoęŠļ›≠pļ‚•X™ļŃ`™ų√B (į≤≥]ęŠļ›¶^∂«ńś¶ž¶W¨į totalAmount)
                const formattedAmount = new Intl.NumberFormat('zh-TW',
                {
                    style: 'currency',
                    currency: 'TWD',
                    maximumFractionDigits: 0
                })
                .format(result.finalAmount);

                // 3. ¶b Alert §§•[§J™ų√BłÍįT
                alert(`??≠qŃ ¶®•\°Iģy¶ž§w¨įĪzęOĮd 10 §ņńŃ°C\n\n` +
                      `?? ≠q≥śĹsłĻ°G${result.orderID}\n` +
                      `?? §ņįtģy¶ž°G${seatDisplay}\n` +
                      `?? ņ≥•IŃ`√B°G${formattedAmount}`+`Ĺ–¶b≠ňľ∆Ķ≤ßŰęeßĻ¶®•Iīŕ°C`);

                //≠ňľ∆≠pģ…ĺĻ
                const timeDiv=document.getElementById('timerContainer');
                const display=document.querySelector('#countdownTimer');

                if(timeDiv&&display)
                {
                    timeDiv.style.display = 'block';
                    startTimer(result.RemainingSeconds, display);
                }

                // // 4. łű¬ŗ¶‹¶®•\≠∂≠Ī
                // window.location.href = "/Orders/Details/" + result.orderID;

            } else {
                // ¶p™GęŠļ›¶^∂«•ĘĪ— (®“¶p°G≥sńÚģy¶ž§£®¨°BłÍģ∆ģwŅýĽ~)
                alert("? ≠qŃ •ĘĪ—°G" + result.message);
            }
        } catch (error) {
            // ģ∑ģĽ fetch ĻLĶ{§§™ļļŰłŰŅýĽ~©őĶ{¶°įű¶śŅýĽ~
            console.error("ł‘≤”ŅýĽ~įTģß:", error);
            alert("?? ®t≤ő≥sĹuĶo•Õ≤ßĪ`°AĹ–ņň¨dļŰłŰ™¨ļA©őŃp√īļř≤z≠Ż°C");
        }
        };


    </script>
}

    <script>
        let selectedSeats = [];
        let TotalAmount=0;

        // 1. ¶Řį įt¶ž•\Įŗ
        document.getElementById('autoBtn').onclick = async function() {
            const response = await fetch('/Seats/AutoAssign', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify({
                    SessionID: "@ViewBag.SessionID",
                    AreaID: "@ViewBag.AreaID",
                    VenueID: "V001", // ≥ołŐ≠nßÔ¨įßAłÍģ∆ģwĻÍĽŕ¶≥™ļ VenueID
                    Count: 2
                })
            });
            const result = await response.json();
            if(result.success) {
                selectedSeats = result.seats;
                document.getElementById('statusMsg').innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-success">§w¶Řį ŅÔ¶ž°G${selectedSeats.join(', ')}</div>`;
                document.getElementById('submitBtn').disabled = false;
            } else {
                alert(result.message);
            }
        };

        // 2. įe•X≠q≥ś®√≤£•X©ķ≤”
        document.getElementById('submitBtn').onclick = async function() {
            const bookingData = {
                SessionID: "@ViewBag.SessionID",
                AreaID: "@ViewBag.TicketsAreaID",
                MemberID: "83542560-1941-48b9-af77-00fc42536fed", // ?? ≠ę≠n°GĹ–ĹTĽ{łÍģ∆ģw Member ™Ū¨Oß_¶≥ M001
                PaymentMethodID: "C", // ?? ≠ę≠n°GĹ–ĹTĽ{łÍģ∆ģw PaymentMethod ™Ū¨Oß_¶≥ P01
                Seats: selectedSeats,
                TotalAmount=TotalAmount
            };

                try {
            // 2. ĶoįeĹ–®D
            const response = await fetch('/Seats/ConfirmBooking', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify(bookingData) // ĹTęO≥ołŐŇ‹ľ∆¶WļŔĻÔ§F
            });

            // 3. ł—™R JSON
            const result = await response.json();

            // 4. ģŕĺŕĶ≤™Gįű¶śłű¬ŗ©őī£•‹
            if (result.success) {
                // ? ¨JĶM≠nłű¬ŗ°AīN™ĹĪĶĺ…¶V Success Action
                // ™`∑N°Gresult.orderID ™ļ§j§pľgĽ›ĽPęŠļ› VMBookingResponse ©włq§@≠P
                window.location.href = '/Seats/Success/' + result.orderID;
            } else {
                alert("≠qŃ •ĘĪ—°G" + result.message);
            }
        } catch (error) {
            console.error("Ķo•ÕŅýĽ~:", error);
            alert("®t≤őĶo•Õ≤ßĪ`°AĹ–∂}Ī“ F12 ņň¨d Console");
        }
        };
    </script>
}

@{

<style>

<div class="container text-center" style="margin-top: 80px; max-width: 550px;">

    @* --- ?? ≤ń§@∂•¨q°GŇÁ√“ĹXĻh§f (Security Override) --- *@
    <div id="gateSection">
        <div class="pixel-container-box">
            @* ľ–√D¶C *@
            <div class="border-bottom border-secondary pb-3 mb-4">
                <h3 class="text-pixel-yellow fw-bold mb-0">
                    <i class="bi bi-shield-lock-fill me-2"></i>[ ¶w•ĢŇÁ√“  ]
                </h3>
            </div>

            <div class="py-2">
                <p class="text-pixel-muted fs-pixel-small mb-4">
                    ¨įļŻŇ@§Ĺ•≠Ń ≤ľņŰĻ“°AĹ–Ņť§J•H§UŇÁ√“ĹX°G
                </p>

                @* ŇÁ√“ĹXĶe•¨ģō *@
                <div class="mb-4 position-relative d-inline-block">
                    <canvas id="captchaCanvas" width="200" height="70"
                            style="background:#000; border: 3px solid var(--pixel-blue); cursor:pointer;"
                            onclick="generateCaptcha()"></canvas>

                    <div class="btn-pixel-text mt-2 d-block fs-pixel-small" onclick="generateCaptcha()">
                        <i class="bi bi-arrow-clockwise"></i> [ ≠ę∑s≤£•Õ  ]
                    </div>
                </div>

                @* Ņť§Jģō°G•[Īj≤◊ļ›ĺųŅť§J∑P *@
                <div class="mb-4">
                    <label class="text-pixel-blue fs-pixel-small d-block mb-2">ŇÁ√“ĹX:</label>
                    <input type="text" id="captchaInput"
                           class="form-control pixel-input text-center fw-bold"
                           style="font-size: 1.5rem; letter-spacing: 8px;"
                           placeholder="____" maxlength="4">
                </div>

                <button id="submitBtn" class="btn-pixel w-100 py-3" onclick="startQueue()">
                    ĹTĽ{įe•X
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    @* --- ?? ≤ń§G∂•¨q°GĪ∆∂§Ķe≠Ī (Server Buffering) --- *@
    <div id="queueSection" style="display:none;">
        <div class="pixel-container-box">
            <div class="spinner-border text-pixel-blue mb-4" style="width: 5rem; height: 5rem; border-width: 0.5rem;"></div>

            <h3 class="text-pixel-yellow fw-bold mt-3 dot-blink">

                <p class="text-white mb-2">ŇÁ√“≥qĻL°IįTłĻ√≠©w°C</p>
                <p class="text-pixel-muted fs-pixel-small mb-0">
                    Ĺ–§Ň§§¬_≥sĹu©ő≠ę∑sĺ„≤z≠∂≠Ī°C<br>
                    ®t≤őßYĪN¨įĪzĺ…¶VŅÔ≤ľįŌ...

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        let captchaCode = "";
        const sessionId = '@Model';

        // 1. •Õ¶®Ļ≥Įņ≠∑ģśŇÁ√“ĹX
        function generateCaptcha() {
            const canvas = document.getElementById('captchaCanvas');
            const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // √łĽs≠Iīļĺł¬I°AľW•[Ń…≥’∑P
            for(let i=0; i<100; i++){
                ctx.fillStyle = i % 2 === 0 ? "rgba(0, 204, 255, 0.1)" : "rgba(255, 0, 204, 0.1)";
                ctx.fillRect(Math.random()*canvas.width, Math.random()*canvas.height, 2, 2);
            }

            ctx.font = "bold 40px 'Courier New', Courier, monospace";
            ctx.fillStyle = "#00ccff"; // pixel-blue
            const chars = "ABCDEFGHJKLMNPQRSTUVWXYZ23456789";
            captchaCode = "";
            for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
                let char = chars.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * chars.length));
                captchaCode += char;
                ctx.save();
                ctx.translate(45 * i + 35, 45);
                ctx.rotate((Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.3);
                // •[§J≥Īľvģń™G
                ctx.shadowColor = "rgba(0, 204, 255, 0.5)";
                ctx.shadowBlur = 10;
                ctx.fillText(char, 0, 0);
                ctx.restore();
            }
        }

        // 2. ŇÁ√“ĽPĪ∆∂§ŇřŅŤ
        async function startQueue() {
            const input = document.getElementById('captchaInput').value.toUpperCase();

            if (input !== captchaCode) {
                alert("? ACCESS_DENIED: ŇÁ√“ĹXŅýĽ~°I");
                generateCaptcha();
                return;
            }

            const btn = document.getElementById('submitBtn');
            btn.disabled = true;
            btn.innerHTML = "UPLOADING...";

            try {
                const response = await fetch(`/Seats/VerifyGateCaptcha`, {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' },
                    body: new URLSearchParams({
                        id: sessionId,
                        captchaInput: input,
                        sessionCaptcha: captchaCode
                    })
                });

                const result = await response.json();

                if (!result.success) {
                    alert("? SERVER_REJECTED: " + result.message);
                    btn.disabled = false;
                    btn.innerHTML = "ĹTĽ{įe•X (RETRY)";
                    generateCaptcha();
                    return;
                }

                if (result.isQueuing === false) {
                    window.location.href = `/Seats/Index/${sessionId}`;
                } else {
                    document.getElementById('gateSection').style.display = 'none';
                    document.getElementById('queueSection').style.display = 'block';
                    startPolling();
                }

            } catch (error) {
                alert("?? CONNECTION_ERROR: ®t≤ő≥sĹu≤ßĪ`");
                btn.disabled = false;
            }
        }

        function startPolling() {
            const check = setInterval(() => {
                fetch(`/Seats/CheckQueueStatus?id=${sessionId}`)
                    .then(res => res.json())
                    .then(data => {
                        if (data.canEnter) {
                            clearInterval(check);
                            let targetUrl = data.redirectUrl || `/Seats/Index/${sessionId}`;
                            window.location.href = targetUrl;
                        }
                    });
            }, 2500); // Ķy∑LľW•[ĹŁłŖ∂°Ļj°Aßů¶≥°uĪ∆∂§°v™ļ∑PńĪ
        }

        generateCaptcha();
    </script>
}

            </div>

        <div class="col-lg-5 ">
            <h2 class="text-pixel-yellow h5 mb-4 fw-bold"><i class="bi bi-list-ul me-2"></i>ŅÔĺ‹•ōľ–≤ľįŌ</h2>
            <div class="area-list-container">
                @foreach (var area in Model.TicketsArea.OrderByDescending(a => a.Price))
                {
                    bool isSoldOut = area.Remaining <= 0;
                    <div class="pixel-area-card @(isSoldOut ? "sold-out" : "")"
                         onclick="@(isSoldOut ? "" : $"selectArea('{area.TicketsAreaID}', '{area.TicketsAreaName}', {area.Price}, '{area.VenueID}')")">
                        <div class="p-3 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                            <div>
                                <div class="text-white fw-bold">@area.TicketsAreaName</div>
                                <div class="text-pixel-pink fw-bold fs-pixel-small">$@area.Price.ToString("N0")</div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="text-end">
                                @if (isSoldOut)
                                {
                                    <span class="text-pixel-muted fs-pixel-small">[ §wßĻį‚ ]</span>
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <span class="text-pixel-blue fs-pixel-small">[ ∂}Ĺś§§ ]</span>
                                    <div class="text-white-50 mt-1" style="font-size: 1rem;">≥—ĺlľ∆∂q: @area.Remaining</div>
                                }
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                }
            </div>

            @* --- ?? ĮBį ≠qŃ ĹTĽ{įŌ --- *@
            <div id="bookingSection" class="mt-4" style="display:none;">
                <div class="pixel-container-box border-pixel-pink p-0 overflow-hidden shadow-lg">
                    <div class="p-3 bg-pixel-pink text-dark fw-bold">
                        <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> <span class="text-white" id="selectedInfo"></span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="p-3">
                        <label class="text-pixel-blue fs-pixel-small mb-2 d-block">ľ∆∂q</label>
                        <div class="input-group">
                            @if (ViewBag.RemainingQuota > 0)
                            {
                                <select id="ticketCount" class="form-select pixel-input">
                                    @for (int i = 1; i <= (int)ViewBag.RemainingQuota; i++)
                                    {
                                        <option value="@i">@i Īi</option>
                                    }
                                </select>
                                <button class="btn-pixel ms-2 px-4" onclick="confirmBooking()">
                                    ĹTĽ{≠qŃ 
                                </button>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <div class="text-pixel-pink fs-pixel-small">[ ńĶßi°G§wĻFĪbłĻŃ ∂R§W≠≠ ]</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        let currentSession = "@Model.SessionID";
        let currentArea = "";
        let currentVenue = "";
        let currentPrice = 0;
        let captchaCode = "";

        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
            if (document.getElementById('captchaCanvas')) {
                generateCaptcha();
            }
        });

        function generateCaptcha() {
            const canvas = document.getElementById('captchaCanvas');
            const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.font = "bold 38px Arial"; ctx.fillStyle = "#003a8c";
            const chars = "ABCDEFGHJKLMNPQRSTUVWXYZ23456789";
            captchaCode = "";
            for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
                let char = chars.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * chars.length));
                captchaCode += char;
                ctx.save(); ctx.translate(45 * i + 30, 45); ctx.rotate((Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.4);
                ctx.fillText(char, 0, 0); ctx.restore();
            }
        }

        // --- ?? ≠◊ßÔ¬I 1°GľW•[ęŲ∂s™¨ļA¶^űX ---
        async function verifyGateCaptcha() {
               const input = document.getElementById('captchaInput').value.toUpperCase();
                if (input.length < 4) {
                    alert("Ĺ–Ņť§JßĻĺ„ŇÁ√“ĹX°I");
                    return;
                }

            const btn = event.currentTarget;
            btn.disabled = true;
            btn.innerHTML = `<span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> ŇÁ√“§§...`;

            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/Seats/VerifyGateCaptcha`, {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' },
                    body: new URLSearchParams({
                        id: currentSession,
                        captchaInput: input
                        // ?? ™`∑N°G§£≠n∂«įe•ŅĹTĶ™ģ◊ĶĻęŠļ›°AęŠļ›ņ≥ł”¶Ř§vĪq MemoryCache ģ≥
                    })
                });
                const result = await res.json();

                if (result.success) {
                    // ŇÁ√“¶®•\ęŠ™ļ¨yĶ{ļŻęý≠žľň...
                    document.getElementById('securityGate').style.display = 'none';
                    document.getElementById('waitingRoom').style.display = 'flex';
                    startQueuePolling();
                } else {
                    alert(result.message);
                    generateCaptcha(); // •ĘĪ—īNīę§@Īi
                    btn.disabled = false;
                    btn.innerHTML = `ŇÁ√“®√∂i§JŅÔ¶ž <i class="bi bi-shield-lock ms-1"></i>`;
                }
            } catch (e) {
                btn.disabled = false;
                btn.innerHTML = `ŇÁ√“®√∂i§JŅÔ¶ž <i class="bi bi-shield-lock ms-1"></i>`;
                alert("≥sĹu≤ßĪ`°AĹ–≠ę∑sĺ„≤z≠∂≠Ī°C");
            }
        }

        function startQueuePolling() {
            const pollInterval = setInterval(async () => {
                const res = await fetch(`/Seats/CheckQueueStatus?id=${currentSession}`);
                const data = await res.json();

                if (data.canEnter) {
                    clearInterval(pollInterval);
                    unlockContent();
                }
            }, 2500);
        }

        function unlockContent() {
            document.getElementById('waitingRoom').style.display = 'none';
            document.getElementById('mainPurchaseContent').style.display = 'flex';
            document.getElementById('stepBadge').innerHTML = "®B∆J 2: ŅÔĺ‹≤ľįŌ";
            document.getElementById('stepBadge').className = "badge bg-primary px-3 py-2";
        }

        function selectArea(id, name, price, venueId) {
            currentArea = id; currentVenue = venueId; currentPrice = price;
            document.querySelectorAll('.area-card').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('active'));
            event.currentTarget.classList.add('active');
            document.getElementById('selectedInfo').innerHTML = `<i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> ${name} - $${price.toLocaleString()}`;
            $("#bookingSection").fadeIn();
        }

        // --- ?? ≠◊ßÔ¬I 2°GľW•[®ĺßbņň¨d°BęŲ∂s Loading°BľW•[•ĢŅ√Ļű¬ŗįťįťģń™G ---
        async function confirmBooking() {
            // 1. ®ĺßbņň¨d
            if (!currentArea) {
                alert("Ĺ–•żŅÔĺ‹≤ľįŌ°I");
                return;
            }

            // 2. ®ķĪo•ĢŅ√ĻűĶ•≠‘ę«§łĮņ
            const waitingRoom = document.getElementById('waitingRoom');
            const btn = event.currentTarget;
            const originalHtml = btn.innerHTML;

            // 3. ?? Ī“į •ĢŅ√Ļű¬ŗįťįť
            waitingRoom.style.display = 'flex';

            // ≠◊ßÔ¬ŗįťįť§Ś¶r°AŇż®Ō•ő™Ő™ĺĻD≤{¶b¨O°u≠qŃ §§°v
            const waitingText = waitingRoom.querySelector('h4');
            if (waitingText) waitingText.innerText = "•Ņ¶b¨įĪzĻwĮdģy¶ž°AĹ–Ķy≠‘...";

            const count = parseInt(document.getElementById('ticketCount').value);
            const bookingData = {
                VenueID: currentVenue,
                SessionID: currentSession,
                TicketsAreaID: currentArea,
                PaymentMethodID: "A",
                Count: count,
                TotalAmount: currentPrice * count,
                Seats: []
            };

            try {
                // ?? Demo ęG¬I°G§H¨į©ĶŅū 1.2 ¨Ū°Aģi≤{°u¨y∂qędģp°vĪ∆∂§ģń™G
                await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1200));

                const res = await fetch('/Seats/ConfirmBooking', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify(bookingData)
                });

                const result = await res.json();

                if (result.success) {
                    // ? ¶®•\°G™ĹĪĶĺ…¶V•Iīŕ≠∂≠Ī°]§£√Ų≥¨¬ŗįť°AŇż≠∂≠Ī¶ŘĶM§Ńīę°^
                    window.location.href = '/Seats/Payment/' + result.orderID;
                } else {
                    // ? •ĘĪ—°GŃŰ¬√•ĢŅ√Ļű¬ŗįť°Aęžī_ęŲ∂s°A®√Ň„•‹ŅýĽ~
                    waitingRoom.style.display = 'none';
                    btn.disabled = false;
                    btn.innerHTML = originalHtml;
                    alert("? ≠qŃ •ĘĪ—°G" + result.message);
                }
            } catch (error) {
                // ?? ≤ßĪ`°GŃŰ¬√•ĢŅ√Ļű¬ŗįť
                waitingRoom.style.display = 'none';
                btn.disabled = false;
                btn.innerHTML = originalHtml;
                console.error("Booking Error:", error);
                alert("?? ®t≤őŃc¶£©ő≥sĹu≤ßĪ`°AĹ–ĶyęŠ¶Ał’°C");
            }
        }
    </script>
}

@section Scripts {
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/sweetalert2@11"></script>
    <script>
        // ?? ≤ő§@ SweetAlert ≠∑ģś¨į≤`¶‚
        const PixelSwal = Swal.mixin({
            background: '#000',
            color: '#fff',
            confirmButtonColor: '#ff00cc',
            cancelButtonColor: '#00ccff',
            customClass: {
                popup: 'border-pixel-pink border-4'
            }
        });

        function confirmCancel() {
            PixelSwal.fire({
                title: 'ĹT©w≠n®ķģÝ≠q≥ś°H',
                text: "ģy¶žßYĪNńņ©Ů!!",
                icon: 'warning',
                showCancelButton: true,
                confirmButtonText: 'ĹT©w®ķģÝ',
                cancelButtonText: 'ń~ńÚ§š•I',
                allowOutsideClick: false
            }).then((result) => {
                if (result.isConfirmed) {
                    PixelSwal.fire({
                        title: '•Ņ¶b≤M≤zľ∆ĺŕ...',
                        html: 'DELETING_ASSET_RESERVATION...',
                        allowOutsideClick: false,
                        didOpen: () => { Swal.showLoading(); }
                    });
                    document.getElementById('cancelForm').submit();
                }
            })
        }

        (function () {
            const timerDisplay = document.getElementById("countdownTimer");
            const expireTimeStr = "@Model.ExpireTimeText";
            const expireTime = new Date(expireTimeStr).getTime();

            const timerFunc = setInterval(function () {
                const now = new Date().getTime();
                const distance = expireTime - now;

                if (distance < 0) {
                    clearInterval(timerFunc);
                    timerDisplay.innerHTML = "00:00";
                    PixelSwal.fire("®t≤őĻOģ…", "ľ∆ĺŕ≥sĶ≤§wŅÚ•Ę°A≠q≥ś•Ęģń°C", "error").then(() => {
                        window.location.href = "/Home/Index";
                    });
                    return;
                }

                const minutes = Math.floor((distance % (1000 * 60 * 60)) / (1000 * 60));
                const seconds = Math.floor((distance % (1000 * 60)) / 1000);

                timerDisplay.innerHTML =
                    (minutes < 10 ? "0" : "") + minutes + ":" +
                    (seconds < 10 ? "0" : "") + seconds;

                // ≥—ĺl§@§ņńŃŇ‹¶‚ńĶßi
                if (minutes < 1) {
                    timerDisplay.style.animation = "dot-blink 0.5s infinite";
                }
            }, 1000);
        })();

        window.confirmPayment = async function() {
            const selectedPayType = document.querySelector('input[name="payType"]:checked');
            if (!selectedPayType) {
                PixelSwal.fire("ŅýĽ~", "Ĺ–ŅÔĺ‹∂«Ņť®ů©w (§š•I§Ť¶°)", "error");
                return;
            }

            const btn = document.querySelector('.btn-pixel');
            btn.disabled = true;
            btn.innerHTML = 'UPLOADING_AUTH...';

            try {
                const res = await fetch('/Seats/Payment', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify({
                        OrderID: "@Model.OrderID",
                        PaymentMethodID: selectedPayType.value
                    })
                });

                const result = await res.json();
                if (result.success) {
                    PixelSwal.fire("¶®•\", "? Ī¬Ňv¶®•\°Iľ∆ĺŕ¶P®B§§°C", "success").then(() => {
                        window.location.href = "/UserOrders/UserIndex";
                    });
                } else {
                    PixelSwal.fire("©ŕĶī", "? Ī¬Ňv•ĘĪ—°G" + result.message, "error");
                    btn.disabled = false;
                    btn.innerHTML = '≠ę∑sĪ¬Ňv (RETRY)';
                }
            } catch (error) {
                PixelSwal.fire("≤ßĪ`", "?? įTłĻ§§¬_°AĹ–ņň¨dļŰłŰ™¨ļA°C", "error");
                btn.disabled = false;
            }
        };
    </script>
}

@model int

<link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/Admin/Programme/Create/step0.css" asp-append-version="true" />

<div class="container mb-5 mt-4">
    <div class="tech-step-container">
        @* ∂ię◊©≥Ĺu *@
        <div class="tech-progress-bg"></div>

        @* ?? į ļA≠pļ‚∂ię◊°G5 ®B•N™Ū¶≥ 4 ≠”∂°Ļj°A©“•H®C®B¨O 25% *@
        <div class="tech-progress-fill" style="width: @((Model - 1) * 25)%;"></div>

        @for (int i = 1; i <= 5; i++)
        {
            var isActive = i <= Model;
            var isCurrent = i == Model;

            <div class="step-node @(isActive ? "active" : "") @(isCurrent ? "current" : "")">
                <div class="step-number">
                    @i
                </div>
                <div class="step-label">
                    @GetStepName(i)
                </div>
            </div>
        }
    </div>
</div>

@functions {
    string GetStepName(int step)
    {
        return step switch
        {
            1 => "įÚ•ĽłÍģ∆",
            2 => "≥ű¶ł≥]©w",
            3 => "≤ľįŌ≥]©w",
            4 => "ĻŌ§ý§W∂«",
            5 => "≥ŐęŠĹTĽ{",
            _ => "UNKNOWN"
        };
    }
}

<div class="modal fade" id="universalAddModal" tabindex="-1">
    <div class="modal-dialog modal-dialog-centered">
        <div class="modal-content cyber-card" style="clip-path: none; background: #000b1a !important;">
            <div class="modal-header border-info border-opacity-25">
                <h5 class="text-info font-monospace m-0" id="addModalTitle">∑sľW</h5>
                <button type="button" class="btn-close btn-close-white" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-body p-4">
                <input type="hidden" id="addModalMode" />

                <div id="idInputGroup" style="display:none;">
                    <div class="tech-key mb-3">ĹsłĻ</div>
                    <input type="text" id="newIdInput" class="form-control order-input mb-4" placeholder="®“¶p°GP">
                </div>

                <div class="tech-key mb-3">ļō√Ģ¶WļŔ</div>
                <input type="text" id="newNameInput" class="form-control order-input" placeholder="Ĺ–Ņť§J¶WļŔ...">
            </div>
            <div class="modal-footer border-info border-opacity-25">
                <button type="button" class="btn-cyber btn-cyber-warning py-1" data-bs-dismiss="modal">®ķģÝ</button>
                <button type="button" class="btn-cyber py-1" id="universalSaveBtn">įe•X</button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="modal fade" id="universalEditModal" tabindex="-1">
    <div class="modal-dialog modal-dialog-centered">
        <div class="modal-content cyber-card" style="clip-path: none; background: #000b1a !important;">
            <div class="modal-header border-warning border-opacity-25">
                <h5 class="text-warning font-monospace m-0" id="editModalTitle">ßů∑s</h5>
                <button type="button" class="btn-close btn-close-white" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-body p-4">
                <input type="hidden" id="editModalMode" />

                <div class="tech-key mb-3" style="background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ffcc00, transparent 120%);">ĹsłĻ</div>
                <input type="text" id="editIdField" class="form-control order-input mb-4" readonly style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05) !important;">

                <div class="tech-key mb-3" style="background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ffcc00, transparent 120%);">∑s¶WļŔ</div>
                <input type="text" id="editNameField" class="form-control order-input">
            </div>
            <div class="modal-footer border-warning border-opacity-25">
                <button type="button" class="btn-cyber py-1" data-bs-dismiss="modal">®ķģÝ</button>
                <button type="button" class="btn-cyber btn-cyber-warning py-1" id="universalUpdateBtn">įe•X</button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@* --- [3. ≥q•ő AJAX ŇřŅŤ] --- *@
<script>
          $(document).ready(function () {

        // --- [∑sľWęŲ∂sń≤Ķo] ---
        // į≤≥]ßA™ļęŲ∂s¨O <button class="quick-add-btn" data-mode="Type">
        $('.quick-add-btn').click(function () {
            const mode = $(this).data('mode'); // Type ©ő Status
            $('#addModalMode').val(mode);
            $('#addModalTitle').text(mode === 'Type' ? '∑sľWļō√Ģ' : '∑sľW™¨ļA');

            // ¶p™G¨O Status ľ“¶°°AŇ„•‹ ID Ņť§Jģō°F¶p™G¨O Type ęhŃŰ¬√°]¶Řį ĹsłĻ°^
            $('#idInputGroup').toggle(mode === 'Status');

            $('#universalAddModal').modal('show');
        });

        // --- [ĹsŅŤęŲ∂sń≤Ķo] ---
        $('.quick-edit-btn').click(function () {
            const mode = $(this).data('mode');
            const selectId = (mode === 'Type') ? '#faqTypeSelect' : '#faqStatusSelect';

            const id = $(selectId).val();
            let text = $(selectId + " option:selected").text();

            if (!id) return alert("Ĺ–•żŅÔ®ķ∂Ķ•ō°I");

            // ¶p™G¨OŇ„•‹ "ID - Name" ģś¶°°Aßŕ≠Ő•u®ķęŠ≠Ī™ļ¶WļŔ
            if (text.includes('-')) text = text.split('-').pop().trim();

            $('#editModalMode').val(mode);
            $('#editIdField').val(id);
            $('#editNameField').val(text);
            $('#editModalTitle').text(mode === 'Type' ? 'ĹsŅŤļō√Ģ' : 'ĹsŅŤ™¨ļA');

            $('#universalEditModal').modal('show');
        });

        // --- [≥q•őįű¶ś∑sľW AJAX] ---
        $('#universalSaveBtn').click(function () {
            const mode = $('#addModalMode').val();
            const url = (mode === 'Type') ? '@Url.Action("CreateTypeQuickly", "FAQs")' : '@Url.Action("QuickCreateStatus", "FAQs")';
            const data = (mode === 'Type')
                ? { typeName: $('#newNameInput').val() }
                : { id: $('#newIdInput').val(), name: $('#newNameInput').val() };

            $.post(url, data, function (res) {
                if (res.success) {
                    // ¶^∂«ģś¶°≥B≤z°GType •ő res.faqTypeName, Status •ő res.name (ID-Name)
                    const displayId = (mode === 'Type') ? res.faqTypeId : res.id;
                    const displayText = (mode === 'Type') ? res.faqTypeName : res.name;
                    const selectTarget = (mode === 'Type') ? '#faqTypeSelect' : '#faqStatusSelect';

                    $(selectTarget).append(new Option(displayText, displayId)).val(displayId).trigger('change');
                    $('#universalAddModal').modal('hide');
                    $('.order-input').val(''); // ≤M™Ň
                } else { alert(res.message); }
            });
        });

        // --- [≥q•őįű¶śßů∑s AJAX] ---
        $('#universalUpdateBtn').click(function () {
            const mode = $('#editModalMode').val();
            const url = (mode === 'Type') ? '@Url.Action("EditTypeQuickly", "FAQs")' : '@Url.Action("EditStatusQuickly", "FAQs")';
            const id = $('#editIdField').val();
            const name = $('#editNameField').val();

            // į—ľ∆¶W≠nłÚ Controller ĻÔ§W°GType •ő typeId/typeName, Status •ő id/name
            const data = (mode === 'Type') ? { typeId: id, typeName: name } : { id: id, name: name };

            $.post(url, data, function (res) {
                if (res.success) {
                    const selectTarget = (mode === 'Type') ? '#faqTypeSelect' : '#faqStatusSelect';
                    const displayText = (mode === 'Type') ? res.faqTypeName : res.name;

                    $(selectTarget + " option[value='" + id + "']").text(displayText);
                    $('#universalEditModal').modal('hide');
                }
            });
        });
    });
</script>

            </div>
            <div class="form-group">

            </div>

            <div class="form-group">
                <label asp-for="SessionID" class="control-label"></label>
                <select asp-for="SessionID" class ="form-control" asp-items="ViewBag.SessionID"></select>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group">
                <label asp-for="TicketsAreaID" class="control-label"></label>
                <select asp-for="TicketsAreaID" class ="form-control" asp-items="ViewBag.TicketsAreaID"></select>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group">
                <input type="submit" value="Create" class="btn btn-primary" />
            </div>

@section Scripts {
    @{
        await Html.RenderPartialAsync("_ValidationScriptsPartial");
    }

    <script>
        let sessionIndex = @Model.Session.Count;

        document.getElementById('btnAddSession').addEventListener('click', function () {
            const container = document.getElementById('sessionContainer');

            // ?? ≠◊ßÔ°GJS ľ“™O§ļ™ļ©“¶≥ľ–Ň“≥£ģM•ő tech- √ĢßO°AĹTęO§£Ň‹•’©≥
            const html = `
                <div class="session-item-tech">
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3">
                        <h6 class="text-info fw-bold mb-0"># ß«łĻ.<span class="row-number">${sessionIndex + 1}</span></h6>
                        <i class="bi bi-trash3-fill remove-session-btn remove-session"></i>
                    </div>
                    <div class="row g-4">
                        <div class="col-md-4">
                            <label class="tech-label">> ¨°į ļt•Xģ…∂°</label>
                            <input name="Session[${sessionIndex}].StartTime" class="form-control tech-input" type="datetime-local" required />
                            <span class="field-validation-valid text-danger small" data-valmsg-for="Session[${sessionIndex}].StartTime" data-valmsg-replace="true"></span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-4">
                            <label class="tech-label">> Ī“į‚ģ…∂°</label>
                            <input name="Session[${sessionIndex}].SaleStartTime" class="form-control tech-input" type="datetime-local" required />
                            <span class="field-validation-valid text-danger small" data-valmsg-for="Session[${sessionIndex}].SaleStartTime" data-valmsg-replace="true"></span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-4">
                            <label class="tech-label">> ļI§ÓĺPį‚ģ…∂°</label>
                            <input name="Session[${sessionIndex}].SaleEndTime" class="form-control tech-input" type="datetime-local" required />
                            <span class="field-validation-valid text-danger small" data-valmsg-for="Session[${sessionIndex}].SaleEndTime" data-valmsg-replace="true"></span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;

            container.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', html);
            sessionIndex++;

            // ≠ę∑sł—™RŇÁ√“
            const form = document.getElementById('sessionForm');
            $(form).removeData("validator").removeData("unobtrusiveValidation");
            $.validator.unobtrusive.parse(form);
        });

        // ≥B≤zßRį£•\Įŗ
        document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
            if (e.target.classList.contains('remove-session')) {
                e.target.closest('.session-item-tech').remove();
                reIndexSessions();
            }
        });

        function reIndexSessions() {
            const items = document.querySelectorAll('.session-item-tech');
            sessionIndex = 0;
            items.forEach((item, index) => {
                item.querySelector('.row-number').innerText = index + 1;
                item.querySelectorAll('input').forEach(input => {
                    const name = input.getAttribute('name');
                    if (name) {
                        input.setAttribute('name', name.replace(/\[\d+\]/, `[${index}]`));
                        // ¶Pģ…ßů∑s validation span ™ļ data-valmsg-for
                        const span = input.closest('div').querySelector('.field-validation-valid, .field-validation-error');
                        if (span) {
                            const valMsg = span.getAttribute('data-valmsg-for');
                            if (valMsg) span.setAttribute('data-valmsg-for', valMsg.replace(/\[\d+\]/, `[${index}]`));
                        }
                    }
                });
                sessionIndex++;
            });
        }
    </script>
}

                    <i class="bi bi-plus-circle me-1"></i>ľW•[≤ľįŌ
                </button>
            </div>
        }

        @* --- ©≥≥°ĺ…ńż --- *@
        <div class="d-flex justify-content-between mt-5 pt-4 border-top border-info border-opacity-10">
            <a asp-action="CreateStep2" class="btn-cyber border-secondary text-secondary">
                <i class="bi bi-chevron-left me-2"></i>§W§@®B 
            </a>
            <button type="submit" id="btnSubmit" class="btn-cyber">
                §U§@®B°GĻŌ§ý§W∂« <i class="bi bi-chevron-right ms-2"></i>
            </button>
        </div>
    </form>
</div>  



@section Scripts {
    <partial name="_ValidationScriptsPartial" />
    <script>
        $(document).ready(function () {

            // ™ž©l§∆
            $(".area-table select").each(function() { syncDataFromTemplate($(this)); });
            updateAllTotalsAndValidation();

            // ?? ¶P®B≥űņ]™ę≤z≠≠®Óľ∆ĺŕ
            function syncDataFromTemplate($select) {
                const val = $select.val();
                if (!val) return;
                const $templateOpt = $(`#venue-template option[value="${val}"]`);
                const $currentOpt = $select.find("option:selected");
                $currentOpt.data("max-row", $templateOpt.data("max-row"));
                $currentOpt.data("max-seat", $templateOpt.data("max-seat"));
            }

            // ?? ŇÁ√“≥ś¶śŇřŅŤ (•[§J¨ű¶‚ńĶßŔľň¶°)
            function validateRow($row) {
                const $selectOpt = $row.find("select option:selected");
                const maxR = parseInt($selectOpt.data("max-row")) || 0;
                const maxS = parseInt($selectOpt.data("max-seat")) || 0;
                const currR = parseInt($row.find(".row-count").val()) || 0;
                const currS = parseInt($row.find(".seat-count").val()) || 0;

                const total = currR * currS;
                $row.find(".total-seats").text(total.toLocaleString());

                let errorMsg = "";
                if (maxR > 0 && currR > maxR) errorMsg = `Ī∆ľ∆§W≠≠∑ł•X (MAX: ${maxR})`;
                else if (maxS > 0 && currS > maxS) errorMsg = `ģy¶ž§W≠≠∑ł•X (MAX: ${maxS})`;

                if (errorMsg !== "") {
                    $row.find(".tech-input").addClass("row-error");
                    if (!$row.find(".error-msg").length) {
                        $row.find("td:nth-child(5)").append(`<span class="error-msg">${errorMsg}</span>`);
                    } else {
                        $row.find(".error-msg").text(errorMsg);
                    }
                } else {
                    $row.find(".tech-input").removeClass("row-error");
                    $row.find(".error-msg").remove();
                }
                checkFormValidity();
            }

            function checkFormValidity() {
                const hasError = $(".row-error").length > 0;
                $('#btnSubmit').prop("disabled", hasError);
            }

            function updateAllTotalsAndValidation() {
                $(".area-row").each(function () { validateRow($(this)); });
            }

            // ®∆•ůļ Ň•
            $(document).on("input change", ".row-count, .seat-count, .area-table select", function () {
                const $row = $(this).closest("tr");
                if ($(this).is("select")) syncDataFromTemplate($(this));
                validateRow($row);
            });

            // ľW•[≤ľįŌ (JS ľ“™O¶P®BģM•ő tech-input)
            $(document).on("click", ".add-area-btn", function () {
                const container = $(this).closest(".session-container");
                const sIdx = container.data("session-index");
                const tbody = container.find(".area-tbody");
                const tIdx = tbody.find(".area-row").length;
                const venueOptions = $('#venue-template').html();

                const newRow = `
                    <tr class="area-row text-center">
                        <td><select name="Session[${sIdx}].TicketsArea[${tIdx}].VenueID" class="form-select tech-input" required>${venueOptions}</select></td>
                        <td><input name="Session[${sIdx}].TicketsArea[${tIdx}].TicketsAreaName" class="form-control tech-input" placeholder="įŌ∂Ű¶WļŔ" required /></td>
                        <td><input name="Session[${sIdx}].TicketsArea[${tIdx}].RowCount" type="number" class="form-control tech-input text-center row-count" value="1" min="1" /></td>
                        <td><input name="Session[${sIdx}].TicketsArea[${tIdx}].SeatCount" type="number" class="form-control tech-input text-center seat-count" value="1" min="1" /></td>
                        <td><span class="total-seats neon-text-sharp text-info">1</span></td>
                        <td>
                            <div class="input-group">
                                <span class="input-group-text bg-transparent text-info border-info border-opacity-25">$</span>
                                <input name="Session[${sIdx}].TicketsArea[${tIdx}].Price" type="number" class="form-control tech-input text-end" value="0" min="0" />
                            </div>
                        </td>
                        <td><button type="button" class="bg-transparent border-0 text-danger remove-area"><i class="bi bi-trash3-fill fs-4"></i></button></td>
                    </tr>`;

                const $newRow = $(newRow).hide();
                tbody.append($newRow);
                $newRow.fadeIn(300);
                validateRow($newRow);
            });

            $(document).on("click", ".remove-area", function () {
                const row = $(this).closest("tr");
                row.fadeOut(300, function () {
                    row.remove();
                    checkFormValidity();
                });
            });
        });
    </script>
}

        </div>

        <div>
            <span class="tech-label text-info mb-3 d-block">> 03_¨°į Ľ°©ķĻŌ</span>
            <div class="row g-3">
                @if (Model.DescriptionImage != null && Model.DescriptionImage.Any())
                {
                    @foreach (var img in Model.DescriptionImage)
                    {
                        <div class="col-md-2">
                            <div class="img-preview-tech">
                                @* ?? ≤{¶b DescriptionImageName īN¨O GUID.jpg°A™ĹĪĶęųĪĶĶīĻÔ§£∑|Ņý *@
                                <img src="@Url.Content("~/Photos/DescriptionImage/" + img.DescriptionImageName)"
                                     class="w-100"
                                     style="height: 120px; object-fit: cover;"
                                     onerror="this.src='https://placehold.co/120x120/000000/00f2ff?text=IMAGE_ERROR'" />

                                <div class="small text-info text-truncate mt-1" style="font-size: 0.6rem; opacity: 0.7;">
                                    @* ≥ołŐ•i•HŇ„•‹ ID ™ļęe 8 ĹX°AľW•[¨žßř∑P *@
                                    ID: @img.DescriptionImageID.Substring(0, 8)...
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }
                }

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        $('.status-toggle').change(function () {
            const checkbox = $(this);
            const noticeId = checkbox.data('id');
            const indicator = $('#statusIndicator');
            const token = $('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]').val();

            // ĶÝńĪĻwűX
            indicator.css('opacity', '0.5');

            $.ajax({
                url: '@Url.Action("ToggleStatus", "PublicNotices")',
                type: 'POST',
                data: { id: noticeId, __RequestVerificationToken: token },
                success: function (res) {
                    indicator.css('opacity', '1');
                    if (res.success) {
                        // ?? į ļAßů∑s¨į≤Ň¶X CSS ≥WĹd™ļ Badge
                        if (res.newStatus) {
                            indicator.html('<div class="status-badge"><span class="status-badge-icon">?</span> §w§W¨[</div>');
                        } else {
                            indicator.html('<div class="status-badge" style="color: #ff3333; border-color: #ff3333; background-color: rgba(26, 0, 0, 0.6) !important;"><span class="status-badge-icon" style="background-color: #ff3333;">?</span> •ľ§W¨[</div>');
                        }
                    } else {
                        alert(res.message);
                        checkbox.prop('checked', !checkbox.prop('checked'));
                    }
                },
                error: function () {
                    indicator.css('opacity', '1');
                    alert("≥sĹu•ĘĪ— / PROTOCOL_ERR");
                    checkbox.prop('checked', !checkbox.prop('checked'));
                }
            });
        });
    </script>
}

@section Scripts {
    <script>
          $(document).ready(function () {
            console.log("INQUIRY_TERMINAL_ONLINE");

            // Modal Ň„•‹ģ…ßžłÍģ∆
            $('#typeManagerModal').on('show.bs.modal', function () {
                refreshTypeList();
            });
        });

        function refreshTypeList() {
            var targetUrl = "@Url.Action("GetPartialList", "QuestionTypes")";
            $("#typeManagerContent").load(targetUrl, function(response, status, xhr) {
                if (status == "error") {
                    alert("PROTOCOL_ERR: ≥sĹu•ĘĪ—°AĹ–ņň¨d¶Ý™AĺĻ™¨ļA°C");
                }
            });
        }

        // ∑sľW§ņ√Ģ
        function addNewType() {
            var name = $("#newTypeName").val();
            if (!name) return alert("INPUT_ERR: Ĺ–Ņť§J§ņ√Ģ¶WļŔ");

            $.post("@Url.Action("QuickCreate", "QuestionTypes")", { name: name }, function (data) {
                if (data.success) {
                    $("#newTypeName").val("");
                    refreshTypeList();
                } else {
                    alert("ERROR: " + data.message);
                }
            });
        }

        // ≠◊ßÔ§ņ√Ģ¶WļŔ
        function editType(id, oldName) {
            var newName = prompt("Ĺ–Ņť§J∑s™ļ§ņ√Ģ¶WļŔ°G", oldName);
            if (newName && newName !== oldName) {
                $.post("@Url.Action("Edit", "QuestionTypes")", { id: id, name:newName  }, function(data) {
                    if (data.success) refreshTypeList();
                    else alert("≠◊ßÔ•ĘĪ—");
                });
            }
        }

        // ßRį£§ņ√Ģ (¶p™G®S≥]™¨ļAńś¶ž°AīN™ĹĪĶßRį£)
        function deleteType(id) {
            if (confirm("ĹT©w≠nßRį£¶Ļ§ņ√Ģ∂‹°H°]≠Y§w¶≥Ņ‘łŖ®Ō•ő¶Ļ§ņ√ĢĪNĶL™kßRį£°^")) {
                // ≥ołŐĻÔņ≥ßA Controller §ļęō™ļ DeleteConfirmed ©ő¶Ř≠q§@≠” AjaxDelete
                $.post("/QuestionTypes/Delete", { id: id }, function(data) {
                    if (data.success) refreshTypeList();
                    else alert("ßRį£•ĘĪ—°A•iĮŗ§w¶≥łÍģ∆√ŲŃp°C");
                });
            }
        }


    </script>
}

@section Scripts {
    @{
        await Html.RenderPartialAsync("_ValidationScriptsPartial");
    }
    <script>
        // ∑”§ýĻwńż
        function previewImage(input) {
            if (input.files && input.files[0]) {
                var reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onload = e => document.getElementById('imgPreview').src = e.target.result;
                reader.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]);
            }
        }

                // ?? ĺ‘≥NľuĶ°ŇřŅŤ
        function openQuickModal(type, mode) {
            let title = (mode === 'CREATE') ? `NEW_${type}_REGISTRY` : `UPDATE_${type}_NAME`;
            let currentId = (mode === 'EDIT') ? $(`#${type}ID`).val() : '';
            let currentName = (mode === 'EDIT') ? $(`#${type}ID option:selected`).text() : '';

            if (mode === 'EDIT' && !currentId) {
                alert("Ĺ–•żĪqŅÔ≥ś§§ŅÔĺ‹≠n≠◊ßÔ™ļ∂Ķ•ō");
                return;
            }

            // ®Ō•ő SweetAlert2 ©ő¶Ř©włq Modal
            Swal.fire({
                title: title,
                html: `
                    <input id="qId" class="swal2-input" placeholder="ID (ĹsłĻ)" value="${currentId}" ${mode === 'EDIT' ? 'readonly' : ''}>
                    <input id="qName" class="swal2-input" placeholder="Name (¶WļŔ)" value="${currentName}">
                `,
                background: '#000b1a',
                confirmButtonColor: '#00f2ff',
                showCancelButton: true,
                preConfirm: () => {
                    return { id: $('#qId').val(), name: $('#qName').val() };
                }
            }).then((result) => {
                if (result.isConfirmed) {
                    let url = (mode === 'CREATE') ? `/Employees/QuickCreate${type}` : `/Employees/Update${type}`;

                    $.post(url, result.value, function(res) {
                        if (res.success) {
                            if (mode === 'CREATE') {
                                // ∑sľWŅÔ∂Ķ®√ŅÔ§§
                                const newOpt = new Option(res.name, res.id, true, true);
                                $(`#${type}ID`).append(newOpt).trigger('change');
                            } else {
                                // ßů∑s≤{¶≥ŅÔ∂Ķ§Ś¶r
                                $(`#${type}ID option:selected`).text(res.name);
                            }
                            Swal.fire('PROTOCOL_COMPLETED', 'ľ∆ĺŕģw¶P®B¶®•\', 'success');
                        } else {

@section Scripts {
    @{
        await Html.RenderPartialAsync("_ValidationScriptsPartial");
    }
    <script>
                // ?? ĺ‘≥NľuĶ°ŇřŅŤ
        function openQuickModal(type, mode) {
            let title = (mode === 'CREATE') ? `NEW_${type}_REGISTRY` : `UPDATE_${type}_NAME`;
            let currentId = (mode === 'EDIT') ? $(`#${type}ID`).val() : '';
            let currentName = (mode === 'EDIT') ? $(`#${type}ID option:selected`).text() : '';

            if (mode === 'EDIT' && !currentId) {
                alert("Ĺ–•żĪqŅÔ≥ś§§ŅÔĺ‹≠n≠◊ßÔ™ļ∂Ķ•ō");
                return;
            }

            // ®Ō•ő SweetAlert2 ©ő¶Ř©włq Modal
            Swal.fire({
                title: title,
                html: `
                    <input id="qId" class="swal2-input" placeholder="ID (ĹsłĻ)" value="${currentId}" ${mode === 'EDIT' ? 'readonly' : ''}>
                    <input id="qName" class="swal2-input" placeholder="Name (¶WļŔ)" value="${currentName}">
                `,
                background: '#000b1a',
                confirmButtonColor: '#00f2ff',
                showCancelButton: true,
                preConfirm: () => {
                    return { id: $('#qId').val(), name: $('#qName').val() };
                }
            }).then((result) => {
                if (result.isConfirmed) {
                    let url = (mode === 'CREATE') ? `/Employees/QuickCreate${type}` : `/Employees/Update${type}`;

                    $.post(url, result.value, function(res) {
                        if (res.success) {
                            if (mode === 'CREATE') {
                                // ∑sľWŅÔ∂Ķ®√ŅÔ§§
                                const newOpt = new Option(res.name, res.id, true, true);
                                $(`#${type}ID`).append(newOpt).trigger('change');
                            } else {
                                // ßů∑s≤{¶≥ŅÔ∂Ķ§Ś¶r
                                $(`#${type}ID option:selected`).text(res.name);
                            }
                            Swal.fire('PROTOCOL_COMPLETED', 'ľ∆ĺŕģw¶P®B¶®•\', 'success');
                        } else {
                            Swal.fire('ERROR', res.message, 'error');
                        }
                    });
                }
            });
        }
    </script>
}

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        $(function() {
            $(document).on("click", "#btnSendSMS", function() {
                var $btn = $(this);
                $btn.prop('disabled', true).text("SYNCING...");

                $.post("/Members/SendSmsCode", { id: "@Model.MemberID" }, function(res) {
                    if (res.success) {
                        $("#inputVerifyCode").val("");
                        $("#verifyBox").slideDown();
                        startTimer(60, $btn);
                    } else {
                        alert(res.message);
                        $btn.prop('disabled', false).text("RETRY_SIGNAL");
                    }
                }).fail(function() {
                    alert("SYSTEM_CRITICAL_ERROR");
                    $btn.prop('disabled', false).text("RETRY_SIGNAL");
                });
            });

            function startTimer(duration, $button) {
                var timer = duration;
                var interval = setInterval(function () {
                    var seconds = parseInt(timer % 60, 10);
                    $button.text(seconds + "s RE-ARM");
                    if (--timer < 0) {
                        clearInterval(interval);
                        $button.prop('disabled', false).text("RE-SEND SIGNAL");
                    }
                }, 1000);
            }

            $(document).on("click", "#btnSubmitSMS", function() {
                var code = $("#inputVerifyCode").val();
                if (code.length < 6) {
                    alert("INVALID_SIGNAL_LENGTH");
                    return;
                }
                $.post("/Members/SubmitVerifyCode", { id: "@Model.MemberID", inputCode: code }, function(res) {
                    if (res.success) {
                        location.reload();
                    } else {
                        alert("? VERIFICATION_FAILED: " + res.message);
                        $("#inputVerifyCode").val("");
                    }
                });
            });
        });
    </script>
}

    document.getElementById('imageInput').onchange = function (evt) {
        const [file] = this.files;
        if (file) {
            const preview = document.getElementById('imagePreview');
            preview.src = URL.createObjectURL(file);
            preview.classList.remove('d-none');
        }
    };
</script>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        $(function() {
            // --- ¬≤įTĶoįeŇřŅŤ ---
            $(document).on("click", "#btnSendSMS", function() {
                var $btn = $(this);
                $btn.prop('disabled', true).text("SENDING...");

                $.post("/UserMembers/SendSmsCode", { id: "@Model.MemberID" }, function(res) {
                    if (res.success) {
                        $("#inputVerifyCode").val("");
                        $("#verifyBox").fadeIn(); // Ļ≥Įņ≠∑ęōń≥•ő fadeIn ©ő™ĹĪĶŇ„•‹
                        startTimer(60, $btn);
                    } else {
                        alert("?? " + res.message);
                        $btn.prop('disabled', false).text("RETRY");
                    }
                });
            });

            // --- ≠ňľ∆≠pģ…ĺĻ ---
            function startTimer(duration, $button) {
                var timer = duration;
                var interval = setInterval(function () {
                    $button.text(timer + "s ");
                    if (--timer < 0) {
                        clearInterval(interval);
                        $button.prop('disabled', false).text("RESEND CODE");
                    }
                }, 1000);
            }

            // --- ŇÁ√“ĹXī£•ś ---
            $(document).on("click", "#btnSubmitSMS", function() {
                var code = $("#inputVerifyCode").val();
                if (code.length < 6) { alert("ENTER 6 DIGITS!"); return; }

                $.post("/UserMembers/SubmitVerifyCode", { id: "@Model.MemberID", inputCode: code }, function(res) {
                    if (res.success) {
                        alert("?? LEVEL UP! ŇÁ√“¶®•\");
                        location.reload();
                    } else {
                        alert("? ŇÁ√“ĹXŅť§JŅýĽ~!");
                        $("#inputVerifyCode").val("");
                    }
                });
            });
        });
    </script>
}

@section Scripts {
    @* Ĺ–ĹTęO≠∂≠Ī¶≥§ř•ő qrcode.js *@
    <script>
        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
            const qrContainers = document.querySelectorAll('.qrcode-container');
            qrContainers.forEach(container => {
                const code = container.getAttribute('data-code');
                if (code) {
                    new QRCode(container, {
                        text: code,
                        width: 160,
                        height: 160,
                        colorDark: "#000000",
                        colorLight: "#ffffff",
                        correctLevel: QRCode.CorrectLevel.H
                    });
                }
            });
        });
    </script>
}

@section Scripts {
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/sweetalert2@11"></script>
    <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
            const collapseElements = document.querySelectorAll('.collapse');
            collapseElements.forEach(el => {
                el.addEventListener('show.bs.collapse', function () {
                    const btn = document.querySelector(`[data-bs-target="#${this.id}"]`);
                    if (btn) btn.querySelector('.btn-text').innerText = '¶¨¶X';
                });
                el.addEventListener('hide.bs.collapse', function () {
                    const btn = document.querySelector(`[data-bs-target="#${this.id}"]`);
                    if (btn) btn.querySelector('.btn-text').innerText = 'ņňĶÝ©ķ≤”';
                });
            });

            @if (TempData["Success"] != null)
            {
                    <text>
                    Swal.fire({
                        background: '#110022',
                        color: '#00ff66',
                        title: '[ įű¶ś¶®•\ ]',
                        text: '@Html.Raw(TempData["Success"])',
                        confirmButtonColor: '#ff00cc',
                        confirmButtonText: '§Fł—',
                        customClass: { popup: 'pixel-modal-content' }
                    });
                    </text>
            }
        });
    </script>
}

@section Scripts {
    @{
        await Html.RenderPartialAsync("_ValidationScriptsPartial");
    }
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/sweetalert2@11"></script>
    <script>
        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
            const typeSelect = document.getElementById('typeSelect');
            const orderIdReq = document.getElementById('orderIdReq');
            const fileReq = document.getElementById('fileReq');
            const signalForm = document.getElementById('signalForm');

            const PixelAlert = Swal.mixin({
                background: '#000',
                color: '#fff',
                confirmButtonColor: '#ff00cc',
                customClass: { popup: 'border-pixel-pink border-4' }
            });

            // ?? ≠◊ßÔ¬I°Gņu§∆ęŠ™ļ≥sį ßP¬_
            function updateRequiredStatus() {
                const selectedText = typeSelect.options[typeSelect.selectedIndex].text;
                // ©włq≠Ģ®«√ŲŃš¶rĽ›≠n°u•≤∂Ů°v
                const requiredKeywords = ["≠q≥ś", "•Iīŕ", "≤ľ®ť", "įh≤ľ"];
                // ņň¨dŅÔ§§™ļ§Ś¶r¨Oß_•]ßtį}¶C§§™ļ•Ű¶ů§@≠”√ŲŃš¶r
                const isRequired = requiredKeywords.some(keyword => selectedText.includes(keyword));

                if (isRequired) {
                    orderIdReq.classList.remove('d-none');
                    fileReq.classList.remove('d-none');
                } else {
                    orderIdReq.classList.add('d-none');
                    fileReq.classList.add('d-none');
                }
             }

            typeSelect.addEventListener('change', updateRequiredStatus);

            // įe•Xęeņň¨d
            signalForm.addEventListener('submit', function (e) {
                const selectedText = typeSelect.options[typeSelect.selectedIndex].text;
                const orderId = document.getElementById('orderIdInput').value.trim();
                const file = document.getElementById('fileInput').value;

                if (selectedText.includes("įh≤ľ")) {
                    if (!orderId || !file) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        PixelAlert.fire({
                            icon: 'error',
                            title: 'ľ∆ĺŕĮ •Ę',
                            text: 'įh≤ľ•”Ĺ–•≤∂∑•]ßt°u≠q≥śĹsłĻ°vĽP°u•”Ĺ–ģ—°v°I'
                        });
                    }
                }
            });
        });
    </script>
}

                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th style="width: 15%">ļō√Ģ</th>
                        <th style="width: 40%">•D¶ģ</th>

                                # @item.QuestionType?.QuestionTypeName

                            </td>

                            <td>
                                @{
                                    var latestReply = item.Reply?.OrderByDescending(r => r.CreatedTime).FirstOrDefault();
                                    string statusText = "≥B≤z§§";
                                    string badgeClass = "status-pending";

                                    if (latestReply != null)
                                    {
                                        if (latestReply.ReplyStatusID == "Y")
                                        {
                                            statusText = "§wĶ≤ģ◊";
                                            badgeClass = "status-closed";
                                        }
                                        else
                                        {
                                            statusText = latestReply.ReplyStatus?.ReplyStatusName ?? "§w¶^¬–";
                                            badgeClass = "status-resolved";
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                                <span class="pixel-status-flag @badgeClass">
                                    @statusText
                                </span>
                            </td>

                            @* ∂i§Jł‘Ī° *@

                                <a asp-action="UserDetails" asp-route-id="@item.QuestionID" class="btn-pixel-text text-pixel-yellow">
                                    [ ¨d¨› ]
                                </a>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    }
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
    }
</div>
