using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using TicketSalesSystem.Models;
using TicketSalesSystem.Service.Images;
using TicketSalesSystem.Service.IUserAccessor;
using TicketSalesSystem.ViewModel;
using TicketSalesSystem.ViewModel.Booking;
using TicketSalesSystem.ViewModel.Member;
using TicketSalesSystem.ViewModel.Order;
using TicketSalesSystem.ViewModel.Programme;
using TicketSalesSystem.ViewModel.Programme.ProgrammeAdminDetail;

namespace TicketSalesSystem.Service.User
{
    public class UserService : IUser
    {
        private readonly TicketsContext _context;
        private readonly IUserAccessorService _userAccessorService;
        private readonly IFileService _fileService;
        public UserService(TicketsContext context, IUserAccessorService userAccessorService, IFileService fileService)
        {
            _context = context;
            _userAccessorService = userAccessorService;
            _fileService = fileService;
        }

        private readonly string _baseUrl = "http://192.168.0.107:5098/Photos/CoverImage/";

        public string GetImageFullUrl(string fileName)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(fileName)) return "";

            // ?? ¶p™GłÍģ∆ģw§włg¶s§FßĻĺ„łŰģ|°AīN§£≠n¶Aęų _baseUrl
            if (fileName.StartsWith("http") || fileName.StartsWith("/Photos"))
            {
                return fileName.StartsWith("/") ? $"http://192.168.0.107:5098{fileName}" : fileName;
            }

            // ?? ß_ęh§~∂i¶śęųĪĶ°A®√ĹTęOĪ◊Ĺu•u¶≥§@≠”
            return _baseUrl.TrimEnd('/') + "/" + fileName.TrimStart('/');
            
        }


        //©“¶≥¨°į ≤M≥ś
        public async Task<List<VMProgramme>> GetProgrammesALL()
        {
            return await _context.Programme
                .Where(p => p.ProgrammeStatusID == "O")
                .OrderByDescending(p => p.ProgrammeID)
                .Select(p => new VMProgramme
                {
                    ProgrammeID = p.ProgrammeID,
                    ProgrammeName = p.ProgrammeName,
                    // ?? ≥ołŐ™ĹĪĶł…•Ģ URL°AŇż Android ™ļ Glide Įŗ™ĹĪĶ•ő
                    CoverImage = _baseUrl + p.CoverImage,

                    PlaceID = p.PlaceID,
                    PlaceName = p.Place != null ? p.Place.PlaceName : "©|•ľ§ĹßG¶a¬I",

                    ProgrammeStatusID = p.ProgrammeStatusID ?? "O",
                    ProgrammeStatusName = p.ProgrammeStatus != null ? p.ProgrammeStatus.ProgrammeStatusName : "į‚≤ľ§§",

                    Capacity = p.Session.SelectMany(s => s.TicketsArea).Sum(a => a.Capacity),
                    Remaining = p.Session.SelectMany(s => s.TicketsArea).Sum(a => a.Remaining),

                    StartTime = p.Session.OrderByDescending(s => s.StartTime).Select(s => (DateTime?)s.StartTime).FirstOrDefault(),
                    SaleStartTime = p.Session.OrderByDescending(s => s.StartTime).Select(s => s.SaleStartTime).FirstOrDefault(),
                    SessionID = p.Session.OrderByDescending(s => s.StartTime).Select(s => s.SessionID).FirstOrDefault() ?? ""
                }).ToListAsync();
        }

        //≥Ő∑s5Ķß§Ĺßi
        public async Task<List<PublicNotice>> GetLatestFiveNoticesAsync()
        {
            var latestNews = await _context.PublicNotice
                .Where(p => p.PublicNoticeStatus == true)
                .OrderByDescending(n => n.CreatedTime)
                .Take(5)
                .ToListAsync();
            return latestNews;
        }

        //Ī`®£į›√D≤M≥ś
        public async Task<List<FAQ>> GetFAQsAsync ()
        {
            var faqs = await _context.FAQ
               .Include(f => f.FAQPublishStatus)
               .Include(f => f.FAQType)
               .Where(f => f.FAQPublishStatusID == "Y") // •uŇ„•‹§wĶo•¨™ļ FAQ                
               .ToListAsync();
            return faqs;
        }

        //ßŕ≠nĶoį›
        public async Task<bool> CreateQuestionAsync(Question question, IFormFile? upload, string memberId)
        {
            // 1. ł…®¨ęŠļ›łÍįT
            question.QuestionID = Guid.NewGuid().ToString();
            question.CreatedTime = DateTime.Now;
            question.MemberID = memberId;

            // 2. ≥B≤zņ…ģ◊§W∂«
            if (upload != null && upload.Length != 0)
            {
                string dbPath = await _fileService.SaveFileAsync(upload, "Questions");
                question.UploadFile = dbPath;
            }

            // 3. ľg§JłÍģ∆ģw
            _context.Add(question);
            return await _context.SaveChangesAsync() > 0;
        }

        //į›√D≤M≥ś
        public async Task<List<Question>> GetMemberQuestionsAsync(string memberID)
        {
            return await _context.Question
                .Include(q => q.QuestionType)
                .Include(q => q.Reply)
                .Where(q => q.MemberID == memberID)
                .OrderByDescending(q => q.CreatedTime)
                .ToListAsync();
        }

        //∑|≠ŻįÚ•ĽłÍģ∆ßů∑s
        public async Task<(bool success, string message)> UpdateMemberProfileAsync(VMMemberUserEdit vm)
        {
            var member = await _context.Member.FindAsync(vm.MemberID);

            // ?? ŇřŅŤ©‚¬ų°G§‚ĺų≠ęĹ∆ņň¨d
            bool isTelExist = await _context.Member.AnyAsync(m => m.Tel == vm.Tel && m.MemberID != vm.MemberID);
            if (isTelExist) return (false, "¶Ļ§‚ĺųłĻĹX§w≥Q®Ō•ő");

            try
            {
                // ?? ŇřŅŤ©‚¬ų°G§‚ĺųŇ‹ßů≠ę≥]ŇÁ√“™¨ļA
                if (member.Tel != vm.Tel)
                {
                    member.IsPhoneVerified = false;
                }

                member.Address = vm.Address;
                member.Tel = vm.Tel;
                member.Email = vm.Email;

                await _context.SaveChangesAsync();
                return (true, "≠”§HłÍģ∆§wßů∑s");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                return (false, "ßů∑s•ĘĪ—°G" + ex.Message);
            }
        }

        // ¨°į ł‘≤”łÍįT
        public async Task<VMProgrammeAdminDetail> GetProgrammesDetail(string id)
        {
            var p = await _context.Programme
                .Where(p => p.ProgrammeID == id)
                .Select(p => new VMProgrammeAdminDetail
                {
                    ProgrammeID = p.ProgrammeID,
                    ProgrammeName = p.ProgrammeName,
                    StatusName = p.ProgrammeStatus != null ? p.ProgrammeStatus.ProgrammeStatusName : "į‚≤ľ§§",
                    PlaceName = p.Place != null ? p.Place.PlaceName : "¶a¬I•ľ©w",
                    ProgrammeDescription = p.ProgrammeDescription,
                    Notice = p.Notice,

                    // ?? ł…•ĢĻŌ§ýĶīĻÔłŰģ| (≠ę≠n°I)
                    CoverImage = _baseUrl + p.CoverImage,
                    SeatImage = _baseUrl + p.SeatImage,

                    // ?? ≥B≤z©“¶≥≥ű¶ł (Sessions)
                    Sessions = p.Session.Select(s => new VMSessionDetail
                    {
                        SessionID = s.SessionID,
                        StartTime = s.StartTime,
                        SaleStartTime = s.SaleStartTime,
                        // į≤≥] VMSessionDetail łŐ¶≥≥—ĺl≤ľľ∆¨Ř√Ųńś¶ž°A•i¶b≥o≠pļ‚

                        TicketsAreas = s.TicketsArea.Select(a => new VMAreaDetail
                        {
                            TicketsAreaID = a.TicketsAreaID,
                            TicketsAreaName = a.TicketsAreaName,
                            Price = a.Price,
                            Capacity = a.Capacity,
                            Remaining = a.Remaining
                        }).ToList()
                    }).ToList(),

                    // ?? ≥B≤z§∂≤–ĻŌ§ý≤M≥ś
                    DescriptionImages = p.DescriptionImage.Select(di => new VMDescriptionImage
                    {
                        ImagePath = _baseUrl + di.ImagePath,
                        DescriptionImageName = di.DescriptionImageName
                    }).OrderBy(di => di.DescriptionImageName).ToList()

                }).FirstOrDefaultAsync();
            return p;
        }

        // ®Ō•ő™Ő≠q≥ś≤M≥ś
        public async Task<IEnumerable<VMBookingDetailsResponse>> GetUserOrdersAsync(string memberID)
        {
            // ≤ő§@≠pļ‚≥—ĺlģ…∂°™ļįÚ∑«
            var now = DateTime.Now;

            var orders = await _context.Order
                .AsNoTracking()
                .Include(o => o.OrderStatus)
                .Include(o => o.Session).ThenInclude(s => s.Programme).ThenInclude(p => p.Place)
                .Include(o => o.Tickets).ThenInclude(t => t.TicketsArea)
                .Where(o => o.MemberID == memberID)
                .OrderByDescending(o => o.OrderCreatedTime)
                .Select(o => new VMBookingDetailsResponse
                {
                    OrderID = o.OrderID,
                    ProgrammeName = o.Session.Programme.ProgrammeName,
                    StartTime = o.Session.StartTime.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"),
                    PlaceName = o.Session.Programme.Place.PlaceName,
                    FinalAmount = o.Tickets.Sum(t => t.TicketsArea.Price),
                    OrderStatusID = o.OrderStatusID,
                    OrderStatusName = o.OrderStatus.OrderStatusName,
                    Seats = o.Tickets.Select(t => $"{t.RowIndex}Ī∆{t.SeatIndex}łĻ").ToList(),
                    // ?? ŇřŅŤņu§∆°Gģŕĺŕ®CĶß≠q≥ś™ļ≥–ęōģ…∂°≠pļ‚≠ňľ∆ ≠q≥ś•Iīŕ≠ňľ∆ (≥o¨Oį ļA™ļ°A≥— 10 §ņńŃ//
                    RemainingSeconds = o.OrderStatusID == "P"
                        ? (int)Math.Max(0, (o.OrderCreatedTime.AddMinutes(10) - now).TotalSeconds)
                        : 0,
                    Success = o.OrderStatusID == "Y",
                    Message = o.OrderStatusID == "Y" ? "•IīŕßĻ¶®" : o.OrderStatusID == "N" ? "≠q≥ś•Ęģń" : "ę›•Iīŕ",
                    TicketDetails = o.Tickets.Select(t => new VMTicketDetail
                    {
                        SeatInfo = $"{t.TicketsArea.TicketsAreaName} {t.RowIndex}Ī∆ {t.SeatIndex}łĻ",
                        StatusName = t.TicketsStatus.TicketsStatusName ?? "•ľ™ĺ",
                        Price = t.TicketsArea.Price
                    }).ToList()
                })
                .ToListAsync();

            return orders;
        }

        // ®Ō•ő™Ő≠q≥śł‘≤”łÍįT
        public async Task<VMUserOrderDetail> GetUserOrderDetailAsync(string orderId)
        {
            var order = await _context.Order
                .AsNoTracking()
                .Include(o => o.OrderStatus)
                .Include(o => o.Session).ThenInclude(s => s.Programme).ThenInclude(s => s.Place)
                .Include(o => o.Tickets).ThenInclude(t => t.TicketsArea)
                .Include(o => o.Tickets).ThenInclude(t => t.Session)
                .Include(o => o.Tickets).ThenInclude(t => t.TicketsStatus)
                .Where(o => o.OrderID == orderId)
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync();

            var isPrintable = true;
            //®ķ≤ľ§—ľ∆
            //var isPrintable = DateTime.Now >= order.Session.StartTime.AddDays(-15);

            var vm = new VMUserOrderDetail
            {
                OrderID = order.OrderID,
                ProgrammeName = order.Session.Programme.ProgrammeName,
                StartTime = order.Session.StartTime.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"),
                PlaceName = order.Session.Programme.Place.PlaceName,
                FinalAmount = order.Tickets.Sum(t => t.TicketsArea.Price),
                OrderStatusName = order.OrderStatus.OrderStatusName,
                Seats = order.Tickets.Select(t => $"{t.RowIndex}Ī∆{t.SeatIndex}łĻ").ToList(),
                IsPrintable = isPrintable,
                Tickets = order.Tickets.Select(t => new VMUserTicketItem
                {
                    OrderID = order.OrderID,
                    ProgrammeName = order.Session.Programme.ProgrammeName,
                    StartTime = order.Session.StartTime.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"),
                    PlaceName = order.Session.Programme.Place.PlaceName,
                    FinalAmount = t.TicketsArea.Price,
                    TicketsID = t.TicketsID,
                    TicketsAreaName = t.TicketsArea.TicketsAreaName,
                    Seat = $"{t.RowIndex}Ī∆{t.SeatIndex}łĻ",
                    CheckInCode = t.CheckInCode /*isPrintable? t.CheckInCode: null*/
                }).ToList()
            };
            return vm;
        }



    }
}



================================================================================
FILE: \TicketSalesSystem\Service\Background.cs
================================================================================


using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using System.Threading;
using TicketSalesSystem.Models;
using TicketSalesSystem.Service.SystemMonitor;
using TicketSalesSystem.ViewModel;
using static System.Formats.Asn1.AsnWriter;
namespace TicketSalesSystem.Service
{
    public class Background : BackgroundService
    {
        private readonly IServiceProvider _serviceProvider;
        private readonly ILogger<Background> _logger;
        private DateTime _lastCleanupDate = DateTime.Now.Date;
        private readonly SystemMonitorService _monitor;

        public Background(IServiceProvider serviceProvider, ILogger<Background> logger, SystemMonitorService monitor)
        {
            _serviceProvider = serviceProvider;
            _logger = logger;
            _monitor = monitor;
        }

        protected override async Task ExecuteAsync(CancellationToken stoppingToken)
        {
            _logger.LogInformation("•Ņ¶bßů∑s¨°į ™¨ļA°A•H§őņň¨dĻLīŃ¶Ż•ő≤ľ®ť");
            _monitor.AddLog("?? ®t≤őģ÷§Ŗ§wĪ“į ...");

            //©wīŃįű¶śĽPī`ņŰ
            while (!stoppingToken.IsCancellationRequested)
            {
                _monitor.AddLog("??Ī“į ©wģ…®Ķņň...", "ĪĹīy§§...");
                await Task.Delay(2000);
                try
                {
                    if (DateTime.Now.Date > _lastCleanupDate.Date)
                    {
                        _monitor.AddLog("?? įĽīķ®žłů§ť°Aįű¶ś¬¬§ťĽx≤M≤z...", "≤M≤z§ťĽx");
                        await CleanupOldLogsAsync();
                        _lastCleanupDate = DateTime.Now;
                        await Task.Delay(1000);
                    }

                    using (var scope = _serviceProvider.CreateScope())//§£Įŗ™ĹĪĶ¶b≠Iīļ™Aį»łŐ™`§J DbContext°A•≤∂∑§‚į ęō•Ŗ§@≠” scope ®”®ķĪołÍģ∆ģw≥sĹu°AĹTęO®C¶łņň¨dßĻ≥£∑|•ŅĹT√Ų≥¨≥sĹu
                    {
                        //Īq DI ģeĺĻģ≥™Aį»°Aģ≥§£®žīN™ĹĪĶ•Š®“•~
                        var context = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<TicketsContext>();

                        _monitor.AddLog("?? •Ņ¶bņň¨d•Ģįž≤ľ®ťĽP¨°į ™¨ļA...", "ĪĹīy§§");
                        await Task.Delay(2000);// ľ“ņņß@∑~ģ…∂° (īķł’•ő°A•Ņ¶°§WĹu•i≤ĺį£)

                        //•ż≥B≤zĻLīŃ≤ľ®ť®√¬kŃŔģw¶s
                        await CleanupExpiredTicketsAsync(context);
                        //ßů∑s¨°į į‚≤ľ™¨ļA
                        await UpdateProgrammeStatusAsync(context);


                        _monitor.AddLog("? ®Ķņň∂gīŃßĻ¶®°A•ľĶo≤{≤ßĪ`°C", "ę›ĺų§§");
                    }
                   
                }
                catch (Exception ex)
                {
                    _logger.LogError(ex, "įű¶ś≠Iīļ•Űį»ģ…Ķo•ÕŅýĽ~°C");
                    _monitor.AddLog($"? ≤ßĪ`Ķo•Õ: {ex.Message}", "≥sĹu≤ßĪ`");
                }
               
                // ®C§ņńŃ∂]§@¶ł
                await Task.Delay(TimeSpan.FromMinutes(1), stoppingToken);
            }
            _logger.LogInformation("Ticket Cleanup Service is stopping.");
            _monitor.AddLog("?? ®t≤őģ÷§Ŗ§w√Ų≥¨", "§wįĪ§Ó");
        }

        //§ťĽx≤M≤z
        private async Task CleanupOldLogsAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                _logger.LogInformation("•Ņ¶bįű¶ś¬¬§ťĽx≤M≤zß@∑~...");

                // ≥]©w§ťĽx¶s©Ů™ļłŰģ| (į≤≥]ßA™ļ§ťĽx¶bĪMģ◊ģŕ•ōŅż™ļ Logs łÍģ∆ß®)
                string logDirectory = Path.Combine(AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory, "Logs");

                if (!Directory.Exists(logDirectory))
                {
                    _logger.LogWarning($"§ťĽx•ōŅż§£¶s¶b°G{logDirectory}");
                    return;
                }

                int daysToKeep = 1; // ?? ≥]©węOĮd§—ľ∆°A∂WĻL 1 §—īNßRį£
                var threshold = DateTime.Now.AddDays(-daysToKeep);

                var directoryInfo = new DirectoryInfo(logDirectory);
                // ∑jīM©“¶≥§ťĽxņ… (*.txt ©ő *.log)
                var files = directoryInfo.GetFiles("*.*")
                    .Where(f => f.LastWriteTime < threshold);

                int count = 0;
                foreach (var file in files)
                {
                    try
                    {
                        file.Delete();
                        count++;
                    }
                    catch (IOException ex)
                    {
                        // ņ…ģ◊•iĮŗ•Ņ≥Q®t≤ő¶Ż•ő§§°AłűĻL§£≥B≤z
                        _logger.LogWarning($"ĶL™kßRį£ņ…ģ◊ {file.Name}: {ex.Message}");
                    }
                }

                _logger.LogInformation($"§ťĽx≤M≤zßĻ¶®°C¶@ßRį£ {count} ≠”ĻLīŃņ…ģ◊°C");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                _logger.LogError(ex, "įű¶ś§ťĽx≤M≤zģ…Ķo•Õ≤ßĪ`°C");
            }

            await Task.CompletedTask;
        }

        //≤ľ®ťńņ•X
        private async Task CleanupExpiredTicketsAsync(TicketsContext context)
        {

            _logger.LogInformation("•Ņ¶bņň¨dĻLīŃ¶Ż•ő≠q≥śĽP≤ľ®ť...");
            // ?? ęōń≥•[§@¬IĹwĹń°]®“¶p 11 §ņńŃ°^°AĶĻęeļ› 10 §ņńŃ≠ňľ∆§@¬Iĺlłő
            var expirationTime = DateTime.Now.AddMinutes(-11);

            // 1. ßš•X©“¶≥°uę›•Iīŕ°v•B°u§wĻLīŃ°v™ļ≠q≥ś ID §ő®š≤ľ®ťłÍįT
            var expiredOrdersData = await context.Order
                .Where(o => o.OrderStatusID == "P" && o.OrderCreatedTime <= expirationTime && o.PaymentStatus == false)
                .Select(o => new {
                    o.OrderID,
                    Tickets = o.Tickets.Select(t => new { t.TicketsID, t.TicketsAreaID })
                })
                .ToListAsync();

            if (!expiredOrdersData.Any()) return;

            var orderIds = expiredOrdersData.Select(x => x.OrderID).ToList();
            var ticketIds = expiredOrdersData.SelectMany(x => x.Tickets).Select(t => t.TicketsID).ToList();

            // ęŲįŌįž≠pļ‚≠n¬kŃŔ™ļģw¶s
            var areaReturnGroups = expiredOrdersData
                .SelectMany(x => x.Tickets)
                .GroupBy(t => t.TicketsAreaID)
                .Select(g => new { AreaID = g.Key, Count = g.Count() });

            using var transaction = await context.Database.BeginTransactionAsync();
            try
            {
                //C# ≠t≥d®MĶ¶°GßP©w≠Ģ®«≠q≥ś∂Wģ…§F°A®√Ķo•X°u≥B®M°vęŁ•O°]ĪN™¨ļAßÔ¨į N°^°C
                //Trigger ≠t≥dŇť§O¨°°G•u≠n¨›®ž≤ľ®ť™¨ļAŇ‹§F°AīN¶Řį •hęŠ•xß‚ģw¶s•[¶^•h°C

                // 1. •ußÔ≤ľ®ť™¨ļA (≥o∑|ń≤Ķo Trigger ¶Řį •[¶^ģw¶s)
                await context.Tickets
                    .Where(t => ticketIds.Contains(t.TicketsID))
                    .ExecuteUpdateAsync(s => s.SetProperty(t => t.TicketsStatusID, "N"));

                // 2. •ußÔ≠q≥ś™¨ļA
                await context.Order
                    .Where(o => orderIds.Contains(o.OrderID))
                    .ExecuteUpdateAsync(s => s.SetProperty(o => o.OrderStatusID, "N"));

                await transaction.CommitAsync();
                _logger.LogInformation($"[¶^¶¨¶®•\] ®ķģÝ≠q≥ś: {orderIds.Count} Ķß, ńņ•X≤ľ®ť: {ticketIds.Count} Īi°C");

                _monitor.AddLog($"¶®•\¶^¶¨ {orderIds.Count} Ķß≠q≥ś°Ańņ•X {ticketIds.Count} Īi≤ľ°C", "¶^¶¨ßĻ¶®");

                
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                await transaction.RollbackAsync();
                _logger.LogError(ex, "įű¶śģw¶s¶^¶¨®∆į»ģ…Ķo•Õ≤ßĪ`");
            }

           
        }



        private async Task UpdateProgrammeStatusAsync(TicketsContext context)
        {
            _logger.LogInformation("•Ņ¶b¶P®B¨°į į‚≤ľ™¨ļA...");
            var now = DateTime.Now;

            // ßž•X R (≥]©wßĻ¶®) ©M O (∂}Ĺś§§) ™ļ¨°į ∂i¶śßP¬_
            var activeProgrammes = await context.Programme
                .Include(p => p.Session)
                .Where(p => p.ProgrammeStatusID == "R" || p.ProgrammeStatusID == "O")
                .ToListAsync();

            bool hasChanged = false;

            foreach (var p in activeProgrammes)
            {
                string oldStatus = p.ProgrammeStatusID;
                string newStatus = oldStatus;

                // ņň¨d¨Oß_©“¶≥≥ű¶łį‚≤ľ≥£§wĶ≤ßŰ -> ¬ŗ¨į E (Ended)
                if (p.Session.Any() && p.Session.All(s => s.SaleEndTime <= now))
                {
                    newStatus = "E";
                }
                // ņň¨d¨Oß_§wĻF∂}Ĺśģ…∂° -> R ¬ŗ O (On Sale)
                else if (oldStatus == "R" && p.Session.Any(s => s.SaleStartTime <= now && s.SaleEndTime > now))
                {
                    newStatus = "O";
                }

                // ?? ≠◊•Ņ°G•≤∂∑ĹŠ≠»ĶĻĻÍŇť°ASaveChangesAsync §~∑|•Õģń
                if (newStatus != oldStatus)
                {
                    p.ProgrammeStatusID = newStatus;
                    hasChanged = true;
                    _logger.LogInformation($"[¨°į ™¨ļA§Ńīę] {p.ProgrammeName}: {oldStatus} -> {newStatus}");
                }
            }

            if (hasChanged)
            {
                await context.SaveChangesAsync();
                _logger.LogInformation("[®t≤ő≥q™ĺ] ¨°į ™¨ļA§wßŚ¶łßů∑s°C");
            }
        }
    }
}

================================================================================
FILE: \TicketSalesSystem\ValidationAttributes\MyValidator.cs
================================================================================


using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;
using TicketSalesSystem.Models;

namespace TicketSalesSystem.ValidationAttributes
{
    public class MyValidator
    {
        private readonly TicketsContext _context;
        public MyValidator(TicketsContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }
        //•x∆W®≠§ņ√“ŇÁ√“ĺĻ
        public class TaiwanIDAttribute: ValidationAttribute
        {
            protected override ValidationResult IsValid(object value, ValidationContext validationContext)
            {
                // ¶p™G¨O™Ň≠»°AŇż [Required] ľ–Ň“•h≥B≤z°A≥ołŐ¶^∂« Success
                if (value == null || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value.ToString()))
                {
                    return ValidationResult.Success;
                }

                string id = value.ToString()!.ToUpper(); // ¬ŗ§jľgĹTęO§@≠P

                try
                {
                    //Ňv≠ę≠pļ‚ (Checksum)
                    // ¶r•ņĻÔņ≥ľ∆≠»™Ū (A=10, B=11... ≥ołŐ≠n¶“ľ{ĮSģŪĻÔņ≥)
                    int[] letterWeights = { 10, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16, 17, 34, 18, 19, 20, 21, 22, 35, 23, 24, 25, 26, 27, 28, 29, 32, 30, 31, 33 };
                    int letterIndex = id[0] - 'A';
                    int letterNum = letterWeights[letterIndex];

                    int n1 = letterNum / 10; // §Q¶žľ∆
                    int n2 = letterNum % 10; // ≠”¶žľ∆

                    // •[Ňv§Ĺ¶°: n1*1 + n2*9 + d1*8 + d2*7 + d3*6 + d4*5 + d5*4 + d6*3 + d7*2 + d8*1 + d9*1
                    int sum = n1 + (n2 * 9);
                    int[] weights = { 8, 7, 6, 5, 4, 3, 2, 1 };

                    for (int i = 0; i < 8; i++)
                    {
                        sum += (id[i + 1] - '0') * weights[i];
                    }

                    // ≥ŐęŠ§@ĹX (ņň¨dĹX)
                    sum += (id[9] - '0');

                    // Ń`©M•≤∂∑Įŗ≥Q 10 ĺ„į£
                    if (sum % 10 != 0)
                    {
                        return new ValidationResult("ĶLģń™ļ®≠§ņ√“¶rłĻ(ņň¨dĹXŅýĽ~)");
                    }


                }
                catch(Exception e) 
                {
                    // ¶p™Gęe≠Ī™ļľ–Ň“®Sĺ◊¶Ūĺ…≠PľQŅý°A≥ołŐ¶^∂«ģś¶°ŅýĽ~
                    return new ValidationResult("®≠§ņ√“¶rłĻģś¶°ŅýĽ~");
                }
                

                return ValidationResult.Success;
            }
        }

        //ĪbłĻ≠ęĹ∆ŇÁ√“ĺĻ
        public class AccountDuplicateCheck : ValidationAttribute
        {
            protected override ValidationResult? IsValid(object? value, ValidationContext validationContext)
            {
                // 1. ®ķĪołÍģ∆ģw§W§U§Ś
                var _context = (TicketsContext)validationContext.GetService(typeof(TicketsContext))!;

                string account = value?.ToString() ?? "";

                // 2. ņň¨dłÍģ∆ģw¨Oß_§w¶s¶bł”ĪbłĻ
                // ?? ™`∑N°G¶p™G¨OĹsŅŤ (Edit)°A≠nĪ∆į£Īľ°u¶Ř§v°v≠ž•Ľ™ļĪbłĻ°A¶ż∑sľW (Create) §£Ľ›≠n
                bool isExist = _context.EmployeeLogin.Any(x => x.Account == account);

                if (isExist)
                {
                    return new ValidationResult("¶ĻĪbłĻ§w≥Q®Ō•ő°AĹ–ßůīę®š•L¶WļŔ°C");
                }

                return ValidationResult.Success;
            }
        }

        //∑|≠Ż§‚ĺųłĻĹX≠ęĹ∆ŇÁ√“ĺĻ
        public class MemberTelDuplicateCheckAttribute : ValidationAttribute
        {
            protected override ValidationResult? IsValid(object? value, ValidationContext validationContext)
            {
                //®ķĪoŅť§J™ļ§‚ĺųłĻĹX
                string? tel = value?.ToString();
                if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(tel))
                {
                    return ValidationResult.Success; // •— [Required] ≠t≥dņň¨d°A≥ołŐłűĻL
                }

                //Īq validationContext ®ķĪołÍģ∆ģwĻÍ®“ (DbContext)
                var _context = (TicketsContext?)validationContext.GetService(typeof(TicketsContext));

                if (_context == null)
                {
                    throw new Exception("ĶL™k®ķĪołÍģ∆ģw≥sĹuĻÍ®“");
                }

                // ņň¨dŇřŅŤ°GßP¬_łÍģ∆ģw¨Oß_§w¶≥¨Ř¶P§‚ĺųłĻĹX
                bool isExist = _context.Member.Any(m => m.Tel == tel);

                if (isExist)
                {
                    // ŇÁ√“•ĘĪ—°A¶^∂«ŅýĽ~įTģß
                    return new ValidationResult("¶Ļ§‚ĺųłĻĹX§w≥QĶý•U°AĹ–īę§@≠”°C");
                }

                // ŇÁ√“≥qĻL
                return ValidationResult.Success;
            }
        }





    }
}

using Microsoft.AspNetCore.DataProtection;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Identity;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using TicketSalesSystem.Models;
using TicketSalesSystem.Service;
using TicketSalesSystem.Service.ID;
using TicketSalesSystem.Service.Images;
using TicketSalesSystem.Service.IProgramme;
using TicketSalesSystem.Service.IUserAccessor;
using TicketSalesSystem.Service.Orders;
using TicketSalesSystem.Service.Queue;
using TicketSalesSystem.Service.Seats;
using TicketSalesSystem.Service.Sms;
using TicketSalesSystem.Service.SystemMonitor;
using TicketSalesSystem.Service.User;
using TicketSalesSystem.Service.Validation.IBookingValidation;
using TicketSalesSystem.Service.Validation.IProgrammeValidationService;
using TicketSalesSystem.Service.Validation.NewFolder;



var builder = WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args);

builder.WebHost.UseUrls("http://*:5098");

// ≥]©w CORS
builder.Services.AddCors(options => {
    options.AddPolicy("AllowApp", policy =>
        policy.AllowAnyOrigin().AllowAnyHeader().AllowAnyMethod());
});



// Add services to the container.
builder.Services.AddControllersWithViews();

builder.Services.AddEndpointsApiExplorer();
builder.Services.AddSwaggerGen();



//Ķý•UGuestBookContext√ĢßO
builder.Services.AddDbContext<TicketsContext>(options =>
    options.UseSqlServer(builder.Configuration.GetConnectionString("TicketsConnection")));

//Ķý•U≠Iīļ™Aį»:≤M≤zĻLīŃ¶ž§l
builder.Services.AddHostedService<Background>();

//Ķý•U¶Řį įt¶ž™Aį»
builder.Services.AddScoped<ISeatService, SeatService>();

//Ķý•UĻw©w™Aį»
builder.Services.AddScoped<IBookingValidationService, BookingValidationService>();


//Ķý•Uņ…ģ◊§W∂«™Aį»
builder.Services.AddScoped<IFileService, FileService>();

//Ķý•UIDĹsĹX™Aį»
builder.Services.AddScoped<IIDService, IDService>();

//Ķý•U¨°į ĹsŅŤ™Aį»
builder.Services.AddScoped<IProgrammeService, ProgrammeEditService>();

//Ķý•U≠q≥ś™Aį»
builder.Services.AddScoped<IOrderService, OrderService>();

//Ķý•UĶÍņņ¬≤įT§∂≠Ī
builder.Services.AddScoped<ISmsService, MockSmsService>();

//Ķý•U¨°į ŇÁ√“™Aį»
builder.Services.AddScoped<IProgrammeValidationService, ProgrammeValidationService>();

//Ķý•UMemoryCache™Aį»
builder.Services.AddMemoryCache();

//Ķý•U¶Ó¶C™Aį»
builder.Services.AddScoped<IQueueService, QueueService>();


builder.Services.AddHttpContextAccessor();

//Ķý•UĪbłĻ§ŮĻÔ™Aį»
builder.Services.AddScoped<IUserAccessorService, UserAccessorService>();

//Ķý•UĪKĹXĹ∆¬Ýę◊™Aį»
builder.Services.AddScoped<PasswordHasher<MemberLogin>>();

// Ķý•U¨į Singleton°A•ĢĮł¶@•ő¶P§@≠”įOĺ–Ňť™Ň∂°
builder.Services.AddSingleton<SystemMonitorService>();

//Ķý•UłÍģ∆ęOŇ@™Aį»°A®√ęŁ©w™ų∆_¶s©Ů¶bĪMģ◊łÍģ∆ß®§U™ļ§@≠”ĮS©w•ōŅż
builder.Services.AddDataProtection()
    .PersistKeysToFileSystem(new DirectoryInfo(@"./MyKeys/")) // ¶s©Ů™ų∆_™ļłÍģ∆ß®
    .SetApplicationName("TicketSalesSystem");               // ≥]©wņ≥•őĶ{¶°ŅŽ√—¶WļŔ

//Ķý•U®Ō•ő™Ő™Aį»
builder.Services.AddScoped<IUser,UserService>();


//Ķý•U Session ™Aį» •[§J Session ™Aį»

//ī£®—§ļ≥°įOĺ–Ňťß÷®ķ(for¨y∂q)
builder.Services.AddDistributedMemoryCache();

// ≥]©w Cookie Ľ{√“
builder.Services.AddAuthentication()
    .AddCookie("MemberScheme", options =>
    {
        options.LoginPath = "/Login/MemberLogin"; // ∑|≠ŻĶn§JłŰģ|
        options.Cookie.Name = "TicketSystem.Member.Cookie"; // ≥o¨O∑|≠Ż™ļ§f≥U
    })
    .AddCookie("EmployeeScheme", options =>
    {
        options.LoginPath = "/Login/EmployeeLogin"; // ≠Ż§uĶn§JłŰģ|
        options.Cookie.Name = "TicketSystem.Employee.Cookie"; // ≥o¨O≠Ż§u™ļ§f≥U
    });

builder.Services.AddSession(options =>
{
    options.IdleTimeout = TimeSpan.FromMinutes(30); // ≥]©w Session ĻLīŃģ…∂°°]®“¶p 30 §ņńŃ°^
    options.Cookie.HttpOnly = true;                // ľW•[¶w•Ģ© 
    options.Cookie.IsEssential = true;             // ĹTęO¶b®S¶P∑N Cookie ¨FĶ¶§U§]ĮŗĻBß@
});





//Ķý•UBookingService
builder.Services.AddScoped<BookingService>();






var app = builder.Build();

//using (var scope = app.Services.CreateScope())

    {
        // ©I•sßA™ļ SeedData √ĢßO

        logger.LogError(ex, "ļō§lłÍģ∆ī”§JĻLĶ{§§Ķo•ÕŅýĽ~°I");
    }
}

// 2. Ī“•ő Swagger (ł—®M Failed to fetch ™ļ√ŲŃš)

    app.UseSwagger();
    app.UseSwaggerUI(c =>
    {

        // c.RoutePrefix = "swagger";

// ... ®š•L§§∂°•ů (¶p StaticFiles, Routing)

    name: "default",

// šŅģśĒĻŚĺĆÁ??•ŚŹ£ Action
public async Task<IActionResult> IndexTest()
{
    // ?ĖŚ??Ä?ČŚŹĮ?łÁ??īś¨°
    var sessions = await _context.Session.ToListAsync();
    
    // ?źŤ®≠šłćś?Á•®Ś?ÔľĆÁ?šĹŅÁĒ®?ÖťĀłšļÜŚ†īś¨°Ś??Źť? AJAX ?ďÔ??ĖŤÄÖÁõī?•ŚÖ®?®ś??ļš?
    ViewBag.Sessions = sessions;
    
    return View();
}

// ?įŚ?šłÄ??APIÔľöś†Ļ?öŚ†īś¨°ś?Á•®Ś?
[HttpGet]
public async Task<IActionResult> GetAreasBySession(string sessionId)
{
    var areas = await _context.TicketsArea
        .Where(a => a.SessionID == sessionId)
        .Select(a => new { a.TicketsAreaID, a.AreaName, a.Price, a.VenueID })
        .ToListAsync();
    return Json(areas);
}

FILE: \VSCode\Order.cs
================================================================================


[HttpPost]
[ValidateAntiForgeryToken]
public async Task<IActionResult> Create(Question question, IFormFile? upload)
{
    // 1. Ť£úŤ∂≥ŚĺĆÁęĮ?™Ś??üś??ĄŤ???
    question.QuestionID = Guid.NewGuid().ToString();
    question.CreatedTime = DateTime.Now;

    // 2. ?ēÁ?ś™Ēś?šłäŚā≥
    if (upload != null && upload.Length > 0)
    {
        // ?ľŚŹęšĹ†Á? FileService
        // ŚģÉś??™Ś??Ļś??Įś??ćŚ???Photos/Questions ??Docs/Questions
        // šł¶Ś??≥Ť∑ĮŚĺĎŚ? "Docs/Questions/guid.pdf"
        string dbPath = await _fileService.SaveFileAsync(upload, "Questions");
        question.UploadFile = dbPath;
    }

    // 3. ÁßĽťô§šłćť?Ť¶Āť?Ť≠ČÁ?ś¨Ąš?ÔľąŚ???ID ?Ćś??ďśėĮŚĺĆÁęĮ?ĘÁ??ĄÔ?
    ModelState.Remove("QuestionID");
    ModelState.Remove("CreatedTime");
    ModelState.Remove("MemberID"); // ?áŤ®≠Śĺ?Session ??

    if (ModelState.IsValid)
    {
        _context.Add(question);
        await _context.SaveChangesAsync();
        return RedirectToAction(nameof(MyList));
    }

    // Ś¶āś?Ś§Īś?ÔľĆť??įŤ??•š??ČťĀł??
    ViewBag.QuestionTypeID = new SelectList(_context.QuestionType, "QuestionTypeID", "QuestionTypeName", question.QuestionTypeID);
    return View(question);
}

 public IActionResult Create()
 {
     PopulateDropdownLists();
     return View();
 }

 // POST: Programmes/Create       
 [HttpPost]
 [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]
 public async Task<IActionResult> Create([Bind("ProgrammeID,ProgrammeName,ProgrammeDescription,CreatedTime,UpdatedAt,CoverImage,SeatImage,LimitPerOrder,EmployeeID,PlaceID,ProgrammeStatusID")] Programme programme, IFormFile newCoverImage, IFormFile newSeatImage)
 {
     //?čŚ?ś™Ęśü•ś™Ēś?ÔľąŚ??ļś??ĎŚú®šłčŚÄčś≠•ť©üś?ÁßĽťô§ Model ?ĄŚ??áť?Ť≠ČÔ?
     if (newCoverImage == null) ModelState.AddModelError("newCoverImage", "ŤęčťĀł?áŚ??ĘŚ?");
     if (newSeatImage == null) ModelState.AddModelError("newSeatImage", "ŤęčťĀł?áŚļßšĹćŚ?");

     // 2. ?úťćĶÔľöÁßĽ??ModelState šł≠Ś?Ś≠óšł≤ś¨Ąš??Ąť?Ť≠?
     // ?†Áāļ?ôŚÖ©?čś?šĹćŚú® SaveChanges šĻčŚ?šłÄŚģöśėĮÁ©ļÁ?ÔľĆś?ŚįéŤáī IsValid śįłť???false
     ModelState.Remove("ProgrammeID"); // ID ?ĮŤá™?ēÁ??źÁ?
     ModelState.Remove("CoverImage");  // ś™ĒŚ??ĮŚ?ś™ĒŚ??ćÁĒĘ?üÁ?
     ModelState.Remove("SeatImage");   // ś™ĒŚ??ĮŚ?ś™ĒŚ??ćÁĒĘ?üÁ?
     ModelState.Remove("CreatedTime"); // ?āť??®š??Ęś?ÁĶ?
     ModelState.Remove("Employee");     // ŚįéŤ¶ĹŚĪ¨śÄßš??Äť©óŤ?
     ModelState.Remove("Place");
     ModelState.Remove("ProgrammeStatus");

     if (ModelState.IsValid)
     {
         try
         {
             // --- ?ľŚŹę?źŚ?Á®čŚ?ÔľöťÄôŤ£°Śįćś?šĹ?Model ?ĄŤ???---
             var createdEntry = _context.Programme
                 .FromSqlRaw("EXEC [dbo].[CreateProgramme] {0}, {1}, {2}, {3}, {4}, {5}",
                     programme.ProgrammeName,           // {0}
                     programme.ProgrammeDescription, // {1}
                     programme.LimitPerOrder,           // {2}
                     programme.EmployeeID,              // {3}
                     programme.PlaceID,                  // {4}
                     programme.ProgrammeStatusID)        // {5}
                 .AsEnumerable()
                 .FirstOrDefault();

             if (createdEntry != null)
             {
                 string cleanID = createdEntry.ProgrammeID.Trim();
                 bool needsUpdate = false;

                 // --- ?ĖÁ?Ťģäśēł?ēÁ??áŚ?ś™?---
                 if (newCoverImage != null && newCoverImage.Length > 0)
                 {
                     // ś™ĒŚ?Ť¶ŹŚ?ÔľöC + PRG00001 + .jpg (?∑Śļ¶Áī?12~13 Ś≠óŚ?)
                     string fileName = "C" + cleanID + Path.GetExtension(newCoverImage.FileName);
                     string path = Path.Combine(Directory.GetCurrentDirectory(), "wwwroot/Photos/CoverImage", fileName);
                     using (var stream = new FileStream(path, FileMode.Create)) { await newCoverImage.CopyToAsync(stream); }

                     createdEntry.CoverImage = fileName;
                     needsUpdate = true;
                 }

                 if (newSeatImage != null && newSeatImage.Length > 0)
                 {
                     string fileName = "S" + cleanID + Path.GetExtension(newSeatImage.FileName);
                     string path = Path.Combine(Directory.GetCurrentDirectory(), "wwwroot/Photos/SeatImage", fileName);
                     using (var stream = new FileStream(path, FileMode.Create)) { await newSeatImage.CopyToAsync(stream); }

                     createdEntry.SeatImage = fileName;
                     needsUpdate = true;
                 }

                 // --- ?īśĖį?ĖÁ?ś™ĒŚ??ěŤ??ôŚļę ---
                 if (needsUpdate)
                 {
                     createdEntry.UpdatedAt = DateTime.Now;
                     _context.Update(createdEntry);
                     await _context.SaveChangesAsync();
                 }

                 return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));
             }
         }
         catch (Exception ex)
         {
             ModelState.AddModelError("", "Ť≥áś?ŚļęŚĮę?•Ś§Ī?óÔ?" + ex.Message);
         }
     }

     // Ś§Īś??áŚ?Ś°ęťĀł??
     PopulateDropdownLists(programme);
     return View(programme);
 }

 private void PopulateDropdownLists(Programme p = null)
 {
     ViewData["EmployeeID"] = new SelectList(_context.Employee.ToList(), "EmployeeID", "Name", p?.EmployeeID);
     ViewData["PlaceID"] = new SelectList(_context.Place.ToList(), "PlaceID", "PlaceName", p?.PlaceID);
     ViewData["ProgrammeStatusID"] = new SelectList(_context.ProgrammeStatus.ToList(), "ProgrammeStatusID", "ProgrammeStatusName", p?.ProgrammeStatusID);
 }

 // POST: Programmes/Delete/5
 [HttpPost, ActionName("Delete")]
 [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]
 public async Task<IActionResult> DeleteConfirmed(string id)
 {
     var programme = await _context.Programme.FindAsync(id);
     if (programme != null)
     {
         _context.Programme.Remove(programme);
     }

     await _context.SaveChangesAsync();
     return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));
 }

@section Scripts {
    @{
        await Html.RenderPartialAsync("_ValidationScriptsPartial");
    }

    <script>

        function setupImagePreview(selector)
        {
             $(selector).on('change',function()
                {
                    let file=this.files[0];
                    let $input=$(this);
                    let previewTarget =  $input.data('preview');

                    if(file==null)
                    {
                        return;
                    }
                    if(file.type!="image/jpeg"&&file.type!="image/png")
                    {
                        alert("ŤęčťĀł?ájpeg?Ėpng?ľŚ??ĄŚ??áś?ś°?);
                        $input.val('');
                        $(previewTarget).attr('src','');
                        return;
                    }
                    let reader=new FileReader();
                    reader.onload=function(e)
                    {
                        $(previewTarget).attr('src',e.target.result);
                    };
                    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
                }
             );
        }
        setupImagePreview('.image-uploader');



    </script>
}

[HttpPost]
public async Task<IActionResult> ConfirmBooking([FromBody] BookingRequest request)
{
    // 1. ?ďŚ?Ś∑≤ŚĒģÁ•®ŚąłÔľĆÁĒ®šĺÜÁĒĘ?üÁõģ?ćÁ?Śļßš??Ä??
    var soldTickets = await _context.Tickets
        .Where(t => t.SessionID == request.SessionID && t.TicketsAreaID == request.AreaID)
        .ToListAsync();

    // 2. ?ľŚŹęšĹ†Á? Helper ?ĘÁ?šĹąŚ? (?áŤ®≠šĹ†Á?Á•®Ś??ļŚ???10x10)
    // Ś¶āś?šĹ†ś?šłćŚ??ĄŚ??Čš??Ćś??łÔ??ĮšĽ•?®ťÄôŤ£°ŚĮęŚą§??
    var allSeats = SeatHelper.GenerateSeatLayout(10, 10, soldTickets);

    // 3. ?ľŚŹęšĹ†Á? Helper śľĒÁ?ś≥ēśČĺ?Ćś?šĹ≥ťÄ??Śļßš???
    var bestSeatIDs = SeatHelper.FindBestSeats(allSeats, request.TicketCount);

    if (!bestSeatIDs.Any())
    {
        return Json(new { success = false, message = "?Īś?ÔľĆśČĺšłćŚąįŤ∂≥Ś??ĄťÄ??Śļßš?ÔľĆŤ??óŤ©¶śłõŚ?ŚľĶśēł" });
    }

    // 4. ?ĖŚ??™Ś?Á∑®Ť?
    var newOrderID = _context.Database.SqlQueryRaw<string>("SELECT dbo.funGetOrderID()")
                              .AsEnumerable().FirstOrDefault();

    using var transaction = await _context.Database.BeginTransactionAsync();
    try
    {
        // 5. ŚĽļÁ?Ť®āŚĖģ
        var order = new Order {
            OrderID = newOrderID,
            MemberID = request.MemberID,
            SessionID = request.SessionID,
            OrderCreatedTime = DateTime.Now,
            OrderStatusID = "Y", // ś≥®ś?ÔľöSQL ?∑Śļ¶Ť¶ĀŚ?
            PaymentMethodID = request.PaymentMethodID, // ś≥®ś?ÔľöSQL ?∑Śļ¶Ť¶ĀŚ?
            PaymentTradeNO = Guid.NewGuid().ToString().Substring(0, 10)
        };
        _context.Order.Add(order);

        // 6. ŚĽļÁ?Á•®Śął (?ÜŤß£ SeatID Ś≠ėŚ?Śļßś?)
        foreach (var seatID in bestSeatIDs)
        {
            var parts = seatID.Split('-'); // šĹ†Á? SeatID ?ľŚ???"1-5"
            _context.Tickets.Add(new Tickets {
                TicketsID = Guid.NewGuid().ToString(),
                OrderID = newOrderID,
                SessionID = request.SessionID,
                TicketsAreaID = request.AreaID,
                RowIndex = int.Parse(parts[0]),
                SeatIndex = int.Parse(parts[1]),
                TicketsStatusID = "Sold", // ś≥®ś?ÔľöSQL ?∑Śļ¶Ť¶ĀŚ?
                CreatedTime = DateTime.Now
            });
        }

        await _context.SaveChangesAsync();
        await transaction.CommitAsync();

        return Json(new { success = true, orderID = newOrderID, seats = bestSeatIDs });
    }
    catch (Exception ex)
    {
        await transaction.RollbackAsync();
        return Json(new { success = false, message = "Ť®āŤ≥ľŚ§Īś?Ôľ? + ex.Message });
    }
}

FILE: \VSCode\Ticlets_1.cs
================================================================================


[HttpPost]
public async Task<IActionResult> ConfirmBooking([FromBody] BookingRequest request)
{
    // 1. ť©óŤ?Á•®Ś?šł¶ś??ĖÁ•®??(?ŅŚ??ćÁęĮÁęĄśĒĻ?Ďť?)
    var area = await _context.TicketsArea.FindAsync(request.AreaID);
    if (area == null) return Json(new { success = false, message = "?ĺš??įÁ•®?ÄŤ≥áŤ?" });

    // 2. ?ĖŚ??™Ś?Áĺ©Ť???ID (?Īť?Ś≠ėÁ?ŚļŹś??Ĺśēł?ĘÁ?)
    var newOrderID = _context.Database.SqlQueryRaw<string>("SELECT dbo.funGetOrderID() ").AsEnumerable().FirstOrDefault();
    if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(newOrderID)) newOrderID = Guid.NewGuid().ToString().Substring(0, 10); // ?ôÁĒ®?Ļś?

    using var transaction = await _context.Database.BeginTransactionAsync();
    try
    {
        // 3. ŚĽļÁ?Ť®āŚĖģ
        var order = new Order
        {
            OrderID = newOrderID,
            OrderCreatedTime = DateTime.Now,
            MemberID = request.MemberID,
            SessionID = request.SessionID,
            PaymentMethodID = request.PaymentMethodID,
            OrderStatusID = "Y", 
            PaymentTradeNO = Guid.NewGuid().ToString().Substring(0, 12) // ś®°śď¨šļ§ś?ŚļŹŤ?
        };
        _context.Order.Add(order); // ŤęčÁĘļŤ™ćš???Context ??.Order ?ĄśėĮ .Orders

        // 4. ŚĽļÁ?Á•®Śął?éÁīįšł¶Ť??õŚļßšĹćŚ?Á®?
        var ticketList = new List<object>();
        foreach (var seatID in request.Seats)
        {
            var parts = seatID.Split('-');
            if (parts.Length == 2)
            {
                int r = int.Parse(parts[0]);
                int s = int.Parse(parts[1]);
                string seatDisplayName = $"{(char)('A' + r)}??{s + 1}??;

                var ticket = new Tickets
                {
                    TicketsID = Guid.NewGuid().ToString(),
                    RowIndex = r,
                    SeatIndex = s,
                    CreatedTime = DateTime.Now,
                    OrderID = newOrderID,
                    SessionID = request.SessionID,
                    TicketsAreaID = request.AreaID,
                    TicketsStatusID = "Sold"
                };
                _context.Tickets.Add(ticket);
                ticketList.Add(new { Seat = seatDisplayName, Price = area.Price });
            }
        }

        await _context.SaveChangesAsync();
        await transaction.CommitAsync();

        // 5. ?ěŚā≥?éÁīįÁĶ¶Ś?Áę?
        return Json(new { 
            success = true, 
            message = "Ť®āÁ•®?źŚ?Ôľ?, 
            orderID = newOrderID,
            details = new {
                AreaName = area.AreaName, // ?áŤ®≠ś¨Ąš???
                Total = area.Price * request.Seats.Count,
                Items = ticketList
            }
        });
    }
    catch (Exception ex)
    {
        await transaction.RollbackAsync();
        // ?ôŤ£°?Éś??įŚÖ∑ťęĒťĆĮŤ™§Ô?šĺčŚ?ÔľöŚ??ĶÁ??üŚ§Ī??
        return Json(new { success = false, message = "Ť®āŤ≥ľŚ§Īś?Ôľ? + (ex.InnerException?.Message ?? ex.Message) });
    }
}

@section Scripts {
    @{await Html.RenderPartialAsync("_ValidationScriptsPartial");}

    <script>
        $(document).ready(function () {
            // ?∂ś?šł?Modal Ť£°Á??ĆÁĘļŤ™ćśĖįŚĘě„Äćś???
            $('#saveTypeBtn').click(function () {
                // 1. ?ĖŚ?šĹŅÁĒ®?ÖŤľł?•Á??ćÁ®Ī
                var nameValue = $('#newTypeName').val();

                if (!nameValue) {
                    alert("ŤęčŤľł?•Ś?Á®ĪÔ?");
                    return;
                }

                // 2. ?ľťÄ?AJAX ?įš??ĄÁ¨¨šļĆŚÄ?Post Action (CreateTypeQuickly)
                $.ajax({
                    url: '@Url.Action("CreateTypeQuickly", "FAQs")', // ÁĘļš? Controller ?ćÁ®Īś≠?Ęļ
                    type: 'POST',
                    // ?ö© ś≥®ś?ÔľöKey ?ćÁ®Ī 'typeName' ŚŅÖť?Ť∑?Controller ?Éśēł?ćŚ??®š???
                    data: { typeName: nameValue },
                    success: function (response) {
                        if (response.success) {
                            // A. ?ēś??ĘÁ?šłÄ?čśĖį??Option
                            // response.id ?ÉśėĮ SQL Function ÁģóŚáļ??'F1'
                            // response.name ?ÉśėĮ?õś?ŤľłŚÖ•?Ą„ÄĆÁ•®?ôÁõł?ú„Ä?
                            var newOpt = new Option(response.name, response.id);
                            
                            // B. Ś°ěŚÖ•šłčś??łŚĖģšł¶Áõī?•ťĀł?ĖŚ?
                            $('#faqTypeSelect').append(newOpt);
                            $('#faqTypeSelect').val(response.id);
                            
                            // C. śłÖťô§ŤľłŚÖ•ś°Üšł¶?úť?ŚĹąÁ?
                            $('#newTypeName').val('');
                            $('#addTypeModal').modal('hide');
                            
                            alert("?įŚ?ť°ě„Ä? + response.name + "?ćŚ∑≤?įŚ?šł¶ťĀł?ĖÔ?");
                        } else {
                            alert("?ĮŤ™§Ôľ? + response.message);
                        }
                    },
                    error: function () {
                        alert("?ášľļ?ćŚô®????āÁôľ?üťĆĮŤ™§Ô?Ťęčś™Ę??Controller Ť∑ĮŚ???);
                    }
                });
            });
        });
    </script>
}
